bibl.title: Text of Kṛṣṇa Miśra's Prabodhacandrodaya (कृष्णमिश्र प्रबोधचन्द्रोदय) as edited by Matthew Kapstein

sourceDesc.note: Differences from the text printed in Clay are primarily: more standard IAST representation without Clay sandhi-and-compound notations, and chāyā placed adjacent to corresponding Prakrit.

editorialDecl.p: I (Tyler Neill) produced this HANSEL edition by manually converting M. Kapstein's submitted Word file into plain text, standardizing some punctuation, and adding structural markup for HANSEL. The text may still contain errors and needs a final proofread.

The source edition is printed in Devanāgarī; the electronic text uses lossless IAST transliteration. IAST differs slightly from ISO 15919; conversion can be achieved via:
ṛ → r̥
ḷ → l̥
ḻ → ḷ
ṃ → ṁ
e → ē
o → ō

Corrections and uncertainties:
Replacement: before after
Deletion:
Addition:
Unclear:

revisionDesc.change: Edited text based primarily on 1936 Trivandrum edition (see CSL vol. intro p. liii) plus some more material not found in the Kerala recension and sourced from other editions. Formatted as Word document.

lg.l: madhyāhnārkamarīcikāsv iva payaḥpūro yad ajñānataḥ,khaṃ vāyur jvalano jalaṃ kṣitir iti trailokyam unmīlati |
yat tattvaṃ viduṣāṃ nimīlati punaḥ, sragbhogibhogopamaṃ,sāndrānandam upāsmahe tad amalaṃ svātmāvabodhaṃ mahaḥ ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: antarnāḍīniyamitamarullaṅghitabrahmarandhraṃ,svānte śāntipraṇayini samunmīlad ānandasāndram, |
pratyagjyotir jayati yaminaḥ spaṣṭalālāṭanetravyājavyaktikṛtam iva jagad vyāpi candrārdhamauleḥ ||

div.p: ((nāndyante tataḥ praviṣati sūtradhāraḥ |))

sūtradhāraḥ — alam ativistareṇa! ādiṣṭo 'smi — sakalasāmantacakracūḍāmaṇimarīcimañjarīnīrājitacaraṇakamalena; balavadarinivahavakṣaḥsthalakavāṭapāṭanaprakaṭitanṛsiṃharūpeṇa; prabalataranarapatikulapralayamahārṇavanimagnamedinīsamuddharaṇopanītamahāvaraharūpeṇa; sakaladigvilāsinīkarṇapūrīkṛtakīrtilatāpallavena; samastāśāstamberamakarṇatālāsphālanabahalapavanasampātapravardhitapratāpānalena — śrīmatā gopalena, yathā khalv — «asya sahajasuhṛdo rājñaḥ kīrtivarmadevasya digvijayavyāpārāntaritaparabrahmānandair asmābhiḥ samunmīlitavividhaviṣamaviṣayarasāsvādadūṣitā ivātivāhitā divasāḥ | idānīṃ tu kṛtakṛtyā vayam | yataḥ —

lg.l: nītāḥ kṣayaṃ kṣitibhujo nṛpater vipakṣā;rakṣāvatī kṣitir abhūt prathitair amātyaiḥ |
sāmrājyam asya vihitaṃ kṣitipālamaulimālārpitaṃ bhuvi payonidhimekhalāyām ||

div.p: tad vayaṃ śāntarasaprayogābhinayenātmānaṃ vinodayitum icchāmaḥ | tad yat pūrvam asmadgurubhis, tatrabhavadbhiḥ śrīkṛṣṇamiśraiḥ prabodhacandrodayaṃ nāma nāṭakaṃ nirmāya bhavataḥ samarpitam āsīt tad adya rājñaḥ śrīkīrtivarmaṇaḥ purastād abhinetavyaṃ bhavatā | asti cāsya bhūpateḥ sapariṣadas tadavalokane kutūhalam” iti | tad bhavatu | gṛhaṃ gatvā, gṛhiṇīm āhūya, saṅgītakam anutiṣṭhāmi | ((parikramya, nepathyābhimukham avalokya |)) ārye! itas tāvat!
((praviśya |))
naṭī — ˹esa mhi | āṇavedu, ayyaütto, ko ṇioo aṇuciṭṭhīyadu tti |˼(eṣāsmi | ājñāpayatv āryaputraḥ ko niyogo 'nuṣṭhīyatām iti |)
sūtradhāraḥ — ārye viditam eva bhavatyā —

lg.l: asti pratyarthipṛthvīpativipulabalāraṇyamūrcchatpratāpajyotirjvālāvalīḍhatribhuvanavivaro viśvaviśrāntakīrtiḥ |
gopālo bhūmipālān prasabham asilatāmitramātreṇa jitvā;sāmrājye kīrtivarmā narapatitilako yena bhūyo 'bhyaṣeci ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: adyāpy unmadayātudhānataruṇīcañcatkarāsphālanavyāvalgannṛkapālatālaraṇitair nṛtyatpiśācāṅganāḥ |
udgāyanti yaśāṃsi yasya vitatair nādaiḥ pracaṇḍānilaprakṣubhyatkarikumbhakūṭakuharavyaktai raṇakṣoṇayaḥ ||

div.p: tena ca śāntapathaprasthitenātmano vinodārthaṃ prabodhacandrodayābhidhānaṃ nāṭakam abhinetum ādiṣṭo 'smi | tad ādiśyantāṃ bharatā varṇikāparigrahāya!

naṭī — ((savismayam)) ˹accariaṃ accariaṃ | jeṇa taha ṇiabhuabalavikkam'ekkaṇibbhacchiasaalarāamaṇḍaleṇa ākaṇṇākiṭṭhakaṭhiṇakoaṇḍadaṇḍabahalaghaṇavarisantasantaasaradhārāṇiarajajjarijjantaturaṃataraṃamālaṃ, ṇirantaraṇivaḍantatikkhakhaggavikkhattasahatthasathapaliattotuṅgamaāṅgamahāmahīharasahassaṃ, bhamantabhuadaṇḍamandalāhihādaghuṇṇantasaalapattisalilasaṇghāaṃ, kaṇṇaseṇṇasāaraṃ ṇimmahia | mahumahaṇeṇavva khīrasamuddaṃ āsādiā; samaravijaalacchī | tassa saṃpadaṃ saalamuṇiaṇasalāṇijjo kahaṃ īriso uvasamo saṃvutto |˼(āścaryam, āścaryam! yena tathā nijabhujabalavikram'aikanirbhartsitasakalarājamaṇḍalenākarṇākṛṣṭakaṭhinakodaṇḍadaṇḍabahalaghanavarṣatsantataśaradhārānikarajarjaratturaṅgataraṅgamālaṃ nirantaranipatattīkṣṇakhadgavikṣiptasvahastaśastraparyastottuṅgamātaṅgamahāmahīdharasahasram bhramadbhujadaṇḍamandarābhighātaghūrṇamānasakalapattisalilasaṃghātaṃ karṇasainyasāgaraṃ nirmathya madhumathaneneva kṣīrasamudram āsāditā samaravijayalakṣmīḥ | tasya sāmprataṃ sakalamunijanaślāghanīyaḥ katham īdṛśa upaśamaḥ saṃvṛtaḥ |)

sūtradhāraḥ — ārye nisargasaumyam eva brāhmaṃ jyotiḥ, kuto 'pi kāraṇāt prāptavikriyam api, punaḥ svabhāva evāvatiṣṭhate | yataḥ sakalabhūpālakulapralayakālāgnirudreṇa cedipatinā samunmūlitaṃ candrānvayapārthivānāṃ pṛthivyām ādhipatyaṃ sthirīkartum ayam asya saṃrambhaḥ | paśya tathā —

lg.l: kalpāntavātasaṃkṣobhalaṅghitāśeṣabhūbhṛtaḥ, |
dhairyaprasādamaryādās tā eva hi mahodadheḥ ||

div.p: api ca, bhagavannārāyaṇāṃśasaṃbhūtā bhūtahitāya tathāvidhapauruṣabhūṣaṇāḥ puruṣāḥ kṣitim avatīrya, niṣpāditakṛtyāḥ punaḥ śāntim eva prapadyante | tathā hi paraśurāmam evākalayatu bhavatī tāvat —

lg.l: yena triḥsaptakṛtvo nṛpabahulavasāmāṃsamastiṣkapaṅkaprāgbhāre 'kāri bhūricyutarudhirasaridvāripūre 'bhiṣekaḥ |
yasya strībālavṛddhāvadhinidhanavidhau nirdayo viśruto 'saurājanyoccāṃsakūṭatruṭanapaṭuraṭadghoradhāraḥ kuṭhāraḥ ||
so 'pi svavīryād avatārya bhūmer bhāraṃ samutkhāya kulaṃ nṛpāṇām, |
praśāntakopajvalanas tapobhiḥ śrīmān punaḥ śāmyati jāmadagnyaḥ ||

div.p: tathāyam api kṛtakartavyaḥ saṃprati parāṃ śāntiṃ prapannaḥ | yena ca —

lg.l: vivekeneva nirjitya karṇaṃ moham ivorjitam, |
śrīkīrtivarmanṛpater bodhasyevodayaḥ kṛtaḥ ||

div.p: (nepathye) — āḥ pāpa śailūṣādhama! katham, asmāsu jīvatsu, svāmino mahāmohasya vivekasakāśāt parājayam udāharasi?
sūtradhāraḥ — ((sasaṃbhramaṃ vilokya)) ārye itas tāvat |

lg.l: uttuṅgapīvarakucadvayapīḍitāṅgam,āliṅgitaḥ pulikitena bhujena ratyā, |
śrīmāñ jaganti madayan nayanābhirāmaḥ,kāmo 'yam eti madaghūrṇitanetrapadmaḥ ||

div.p: madvacanāc cāyam upajātakrodha iva lakṣyate | tad apasaraṇam evāsmākam itaḥ śreyaḥ |
((niṣkrāntau |)) prastāvanā |
((tataḥ praviśati yathānirdiṣṭaḥ kāmo ratiś ca |))
kāmaḥ — ((sakrodham, āḥ pāpeti pūrvoktam eva paṭhitvā)) nanu re re bharatādhama!

lg.l: prabhavati manasi viveko viduṣām api śāstrasaṃbhavas tāvat, |
nipatanti dṛṣṭiviśikhā yāvan nendīvarākṣīṇām ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: ramyaṃ harmyatalaṃ, navāḥ sunayanā, guñjaddvirephā latāḥ,pronmīlannavamallikā, surabhayo vātāḥ, sacandrāḥ kṣapāḥ — |
ity etāni jayanti hanta paritaḥ śastrāṇy amoghāni me,tad bhoḥ kīdṛg asau vivekavibhavaḥ, kīdṛg prabodhodayaḥ? ||

div.p: ratiḥ — ˹ajjaütta! garuo kkhu mahāraamahāmohassa paḍivakkho viveo tti takkemi |˼(āryaputra! garīyān khalu mahārājamahāmohasya pratipakṣo viveka iti tarkayāmi |)
kāmaḥ — priye, kutas tavedaṃ strīsvabhāvasulabhaṃ vivekād bhayam utpannam? paśya —

lg.l: api yadi viśikhāḥ śarāsanaṃ vā kusumam ayaṃ sasurāsuraṃ tathāpi,mama jagad akhilaṃ, varoru! nājñām idam atilaṅghya dhṛtiṃ muhūrtam eti ||

lg.head: tathā hi —
lg.l: ahalyāyā jāraḥ surapatir abhūd, ātmatanayāṃprajānātho 'yāsīd, abhajata guror indur abalām |
iti prāyaḥ ko vā na padam apade 'kāryata mayā?śramo madbāṇānāṃ ka iva bhuvanonmāthavidhiṣu? ||

div.p: ratiḥ — ˹ajjaütta evvaṃ edaṃ | taha vi mahāsahāasaṃpaṇṇo saṅgidavvo aradī | jado 'ssa jamaṇiamappamuhā amaccā mahābalā suṇiandi |˼(āryaputra, evaṃ etat | tathāpi mahāsahāyasaṃpannaḥ śaṅkitavyo 'ratiḥ | yato 'sya yaminiyamapramukhā amātyā mahābalāḥ śrūyante |)
kāmaḥ — priye, yān etān rājño vivekasya balavato yamādīn aṣṭāv amātyān paśyasi ta ete niyatam asmābhir abhiyuktamātrād drāg eva vighaṭiṣyante | tathā hi —

lg.l: ahiṃsā kāiva kopasya? brahmacaryādayo mama? |
lobhasya purataḥ ke 'mī — satyāsteyāparigrahāḥ? ||

div.p: yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇāsamādhayas tu, nirvikāracittāikasādhyatvād, īṣatkarasamunmūlanā eva | api ca striya evāmīṣāṃ kṛtyās tenāite 'smadgocarā eva na vartante | yataḥ —

lg.l: santu vilokanabhāṣaṇavilāsaparihāsakeliparirambhāḥ! |
smaraṇam api kāminīnām alam iha manaso vikārāya ||

div.p: viśeṣataś cāite madamānamātsaryadambhastambhalobhādibhir asmatsvāmivallabhair abhiyujyamānā narapatimantriṇo 'dharmam evāśrayiṣyante |
ratiḥ — ˹sudaṃ mae tumhāṇaṃ samadamaviveappahudīṇaṃ ca ekkaṃ uppattitthāṇaṃ ti |˼(śrutaṃ mayā yuṣmākaṃ śamadamavivekaprabhṛtīnāṃ caikam utpattisthānam iti |)
kāmaḥ — āḥ, priye, kim ucyata «ekam utpattisthānam” iti, nanu janaka evāsmākam abhinnaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: saṃbhūtaḥ prathamamaheśvarasya saṅgān māyāyāṃ mana iti viśrutas tanūjaḥ |
trailokyaṃ sakalam idaṃ visṛjya bhūyas tenātho janitam idam kuladvayaṃ naḥ ||

div.p: tasya ca pravṛttinivṛttī dve dharmapatnyau | tayoḥ pravṛttyāṃ samutpannaṃ mahāmohapradhānam ekaṃ kulam | nivṛttyāṃ ca dvitīyaṃ vivekapradhānam iti |
ratiḥ — ˹ajjaütta jaï evvaṃ, tā kiṃ ṇimittaṃ tumhāṇaṃ soarāṇaṃ vi īrisaṃ veram?˼(āryaputra, yady evaṃ, tat kinnimittaṃ yuṣmākaṃ sodarāṇām api īdṛśaṃ vairam?)

lg.head: kāmaḥ — priye,
lg.l: ekāmiṣaprabhavam eva mahīpatīnāmujjṛmbhate jagati vairam iti prasiddham |
pṛthvīnimittam abhavat kurupāṇḍavānāṃtīvras tathā hi bhuvanakṣayakṛdvirodhaḥ ||

div.p: sarvam evāitaj jagad asmākaṃ pitryam upārjanaṃ, tac cāsmābhis tātavallabhatayā sarvam evākrāntam, teṣāṃ tu viralaḥ pracāraḥ | tenāite pāpāḥ sāṃprataṃ pitaram asmāṃś conmūlayitum udyatāḥ!

ratiḥ — ˹sāntaṃ pāvaṃ sāntaṃ pāvaṃ | ajjaütta kiṃ edaṃ pāvaṃ viddesamatteṇa tehiṃ āraddhaṃ? ahavā uvāo vi ko vi ettha mantido?˼(śāntaṃ pāpaṃ, śāntaṃ pāpam! āryaputra, kiṃ etat pāpaṃ vidveṣamātreṇa tair ārabdham? athavā upāyo 'pi ko 'py atra mantritaḥ?)
kāmaḥ — priye, asty atra kiṃcin niguḍhaṃ bījam |
ratiḥ — ˹ajjaütta tā kiṃ ṇa ugghāḍīadi?˼(āryaputra, tat kiṃ nodghāṭyate?)
kāmaḥ — priye, bhavatī strīsvabhāvād bhīrur iti, na dāruṇakarma pāpīyasām udāhriyate!
ratiḥ — ((sabhayam)) ˹ajjaütta kerisaṃ tam?˼(āryaputra, kīdṛśaṃ tat?)
kāmaḥ — priye, na bhetavyaṃ, na bhetavyam | hatāśānāṃ manorathamātram evāitat | asti kilāiṣā kiṃvadantī — «asmākaṃ kule kālarātrikalpā vidyā nāma rākṣasī samutpatsyata” iti |
ratiḥ — ((sabhayam)) ˹haddhi! kadhaṃ uṇa amhāṇaṃ kule rakkhasi? tti vevadi me hiaam |˼(hā dhik! katham punar asmākaṃ kule rākṣasīti? vepate me hṛdayam |)
kāmaḥ — priye, na bhetavyaṃ, ne bhetavyaṃ | kiṃvadantīmātram etat |
ratiḥ — ˹aha tāe rakkhasīe kiṃ kādavvam?˼(atha tayā rākṣasyā kiṃ kartavyam?)
kāmaḥ — priye asti kilāiṣā prājāpatyā sarasvatī —

lg.l: puṃsaḥ saṅgasamujjhitasya gṛhiṇī māyeti tenāpy asāvaspṛṣṭāpi manaḥ prasūya tanayaṃ; lokān asūta kramāt |
tasmād eva janiṣyate punar asau vidyeti kanyā yayātātas te ca sahodarāś ca jananī sarvaṃ ca bhakṣyaṃ kulam ||

div.p: ratiḥ — ((satrāsotkampam)) ˹ajjaütta! parittāāhi, parittāāhi!˼(āryaputra! paritrāyasva, paritrāyasva!) ((iti bhartāram āliṅgati |))
kāmaḥ — ((sparśasukham abhinīya | svagatam |))

lg.l: sphuradromodbhedas taralataratārākuladṛśo,bhayotkampottuṅgastanayugabharāsaṅgasubhagaḥ |
adhīrākṣyā guñjanmaṇivalayadorvalliracitaḥ;parīrambho modaṃ janayati ca saṃmohayati ca ||

div.p: ((prakāśam | dṛḍhaṃ pariṣvajya |)) priye, na bhetavyaṃ, na bhetavyam | asmāsu jīvatsu kuto vidyotpattiḥ?
ratiḥ — ˹ajjaütta kiṃ tāe rakkhassīe uppattī amhāṇaṃ paḍivakkhāṇaṃ sammadā?˼(āryaputra, kiṃ tasyā rākṣasyā utpattir asmākaṃ pratipakṣāṇāṃ sammatā?)
kāmaḥ — bāḍham! sā khalu vivekenopaniṣaddevyāṃ prabodhacandreṇa bhrātrā samaṃ janayitavyā | tatra sarva evāite śamadamādayaḥ pratipannodyogāḥ |
ratiḥ — ˹kahaṃ puṇa appaṇo vināsakāriṇīe vijjāe uppattī tehiṃ duvviṇīdehiṃ silāhijjaï?˼(katham punar ātmano vināśakāriṇyā vidyāyā utpattir tair durvinītaiḥ slāghyate?)
kāmaḥ — priye, kulakṣayapravṛttānāṃ pāpakāriṇāṃ kutaḥ svaparapratyavāyagaṇanā? paśya —

lg.l: sahajamalinavakrabhāvabhājāṃbhavati bhavaḥ prabhavātmanāśahetuḥ |
jaladharapadavīm avāpya dhūmojvalanavināśam anuprayāti nāśam ||

div.p: (nepathye) — āḥ pāpa! durātman! katham asmān eva «pāpakāriṇa” ity ākṣipasi | nanu re!

lg.l: guror apy avaliptasya, kāryākāryam ajānataḥ, |
utpathaṃ pratipannasya, parityāgo vidhīyate ||

div.p: iti paurāṇikīṃ gāthāṃ purāṇavida udāharanti! anena cāsmākaṃ janakenāhaṅkārānuvartinā jagatpatiḥ pitāiva tāvad baddhaḥ! mohādibhiś ca sa eva bandhaḥ sudṛḍhatāṃ nītaḥ |

kāmaḥ — ((samantād avalokya)) priye, ayam asmākaṃ kule jyāyān matyā devyā saha viveka ita evābhivartate | ya eṣaḥ —
nirbhartsyamāna iva mānadhanaḥ kṛśāṅgaḥ |

lg.l: rāgādibhiḥ svarasacāribhir āttakāntir
matyā nitāntakaluṣīkṛtayā śaśaṅkaḥkāntyeva sāndratuhināntarito vibhāti ||

div.p: tan na yuktam ihāsmākam avasthātum |
((iti niṣkrāntau)) viṣkambhaḥ
((tataḥ praviśati rājā viveko matiś ca))
rājā — ((vicintya)) priye, śrutaṃ tvayāsya durvinītasya kāmabaṭor madavisphūrjitaṃ vaco yad asmān eva pāpakāriṇa ity ākṣipati?
matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta kiṃ appaṇo dosaṃ loo viāṇādi?˼(āryaputra, kim ātmano doṣaṃ loko vijānāti?)

lg.head: rājā — paśya —
lg.l: asāv ahaṅkāraparair durātmabhirnibadhya taiḥ pāpaśaṭhair madādibhiḥ, |
ciraṃ cidānandamayo nirañjanojagatpatir dīnadaśām anīyata ||

div.p: ta ete puṇyakāriṇo vayaṃ tu tanmuktaye pravṛttāḥ pāpakāriṇa! ity aho jitaṃ durātmabhiḥ!

matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta, jado so sahaāṇandasundarasahāvo ṇiccappaāsapphurantasaalattihuaṇappaāro paramessaro suṇīadi | tā kahaṃ edehiṃ duvviṇoḍhḍhehiṃ baṃdhia mahāmohasāare ṇikkhitto?˼(āryaputra, yato 'sau sahajānandasundarasvabhāvo nityaprakāśasphuratsakalatribhuvanapracāraḥ parameśvaraḥ śrūyate | tasmāt katham etair dirvidagdhair bandhitvā mahāmohasāgare nikṣiptaḥ |)

lg.head: rājā — priye,
lg.l: satatadhṛtir apy uccaiḥ śānto 'py avāptamahodayo'py adhigatanayo 'py antaḥsvaccho 'py udīritadhīr api, |
tyajati sahajaṃ dhairyaṃ strībhiḥ pratāritamānasaḥ.svam api yad ayaṃ māyāsaṅgāt pumān iti vismṛtaḥ? ||

div.p: matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta, ṇaṃ andhakāralehāe sahassarassiṇo tirakkāro jaṃ māāe taha papphurantamahappaāsasāarassa devassa vi ahihavo |˼(āryaputra, nanu andhakāralekhayā sahasraraśmes tiraskāro yan māyayā tathā prasphuranmahāprakāśasāgarasya devasyāpy abhibhavaḥ |)
rājā — priye, avicārasiddheyaṃ veśyāvilāsinīva māyā asato 'pi bhāvānupadarśayantī puruṣaṃ vañcayati | paśya —

lg.l: sphaṭikamaṇivad bhāsvān devaḥ pragāḍham anāryayāvikṛtim anayā nītaḥ kām apy asaṅgatavikriyaḥ |
na khalu tad upaśleṣād asya vyapaiti rucir manāk,prabhavati tathā 'py eṣā puṃso vidhātum adhīratām ||

div.p: matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta, kiṃ puṇa kālaṇaṃ jeṇa taha udāracaridaṃ duvviḍhḍhā patāredi?˼(āryaputra, kiṃ punaḥ kāraṇaṃ yena sā tathodāracaritaṃ durvidagdhā pratārayati?)
rājā — na khalu prayojanaṃ kāraṇaṃ vā vilokya māyā pravartate | svabhāvaḥ khalv asau strīpiśācīnāṃ | paśya —

lg.l: saṃmohayanti, madayanti, viḍambayanti;nirbhartsayanti, ramayanti, viṣādayanti |
etāḥ praviśya sadayaṃ hṛdayaṃ narāṇāṃ,kiṃ nāma vāmanayanā na samācaranti? ||

div.p: asti cāparam api kāraṇam |
matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta, kiṃ ṇāma taṃ kālaṇam?˼(āryaputra, kiṃ nāma tat kāraṇam |)

rājā — evam anayā durācārayā vicintitaṃ yad «ahaṃ tāvad gatayauvanā varṣīyasījātā | ayaṃ ca purāṇapuruṣaḥ svabhāvād eva viṣayarasavimukhaḥ | tataḥ svatanayam eva pārameśvarapade niveśayāmī”ti tam eva mātur abhiprāyam āsādya nitāntatatpratyāsannatayā tadrūpatām ivāpannena manasā navadvārāṇi purāṇi racayitvā |

lg.l: eko 'pi bahudhā teṣu vicchidyeva niveśitaḥ |
svaceṣṭitam atho tasmin nidadhāti maṇāv iva ||

div.p: matiḥ — ((vicintya)) ˹jārisī mādā putto vi tāriso jevva jādo |˼(yādṛśī mātā putro 'pi tāḍṛśa eva jātaḥ |)
rājā — tato 'sāv ahaṃkāreṇa cittasya jyeṣṭhaputreṇa naptrā pariṣvaktaḥ | tataś cāsāv īśvaraḥ —

lg.l: «jāto 'haṃ janako mamāiṣa jananī kṣetraṃ kalatraṃ kulaṃputrā mitram arātayo vasu balaṃ vidyāḥ suhṛd bāndhavāḥ” |
cittaspanditakalpanām anubhavan vidvān avidyāmayīṃnidrām etya vighūrṇito bahuvidhān svapnān imān paśyati ||

div.p: matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta evvaṃ dīhadīhataraṇiddāviddāviappabohe paramessare kahaṃ pabohuppattī bhavissadi?˼(āryaputra, evaṃ dīrghadīrghataranidrāvidrāvitaprabodhe parameśvare kathaṃ prabodhotpattir bhaviṣyati |)
rājā — ((salajjam adhomukhas tiṣṭhati |))
matiḥ — ˹kitti guruaralajjābharaṇamidaseharo tūṇhīṃbhūdo 'si?˼(kimiti gurutaralajjābharanamitaśekharas tūṣṇīṃbhūto 'si |)
rājā — priye, serṣyaṃ prāyeṇa yoṣitāṃ bhavati hṛdayam | tena sāparāḍham ivātmānaṃ śaṅke |

matiḥ — ˹aṇṇāo tāo itthiāo, jāo sarasappaüttassa vā dhammapahavāvārappavuttassa vā bhattuṇo hiaadiaṃ vihaṇandi |˼(anyās tāḥ striyo, yāḥ svarasapravṛttasya vā dharmapathavyāpārapravṛttasya vā bhartur hṛdayepsitaṃ vighnanti |)

lg.head: rājā — priye —
lg.l: māninyāś ciraviprayogajanitāsūyākulāyā bhavecchāntyāder anukūlanād upaniṣaddevyā mayā saṃgamaḥ, |
tūṣṇīṃ ced viṣayānapāsya bhavatī tiṣṭhen muhūrtaṃ tatojāgratsvapnasuṣuptidhāmavirahāt prāptaḥ prabodhodayaḥ ||

div.p: matiḥ — ˹ajjaütta, jadi evaṃ kulappahuṇo diḍhagaṃthiṇiṭṭhāvia bandhamokkho bhodi tado tāe ṇiccāṇubaddho jevva ajjaütto bhodu! suṭṭhu me piam |˼(āryaputra, yady evaṃ kulaprabhor dṛḍhagranthiniṣṭhāpita bandhamokṣo bhavati tatas tayā nityānubaddha evāryaputro bhavatu | suṣṭhu me priyam |)
rājā — yady evaṃ prasannāsi siddhās tarhy asmākaṃ manorathāḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: baddhvāiko bahudhā vibhajya jagatām ādiḥ prabhuḥ śāśvataḥkṣiptvā yaiḥ puruṣaḥ pureṣu paramo mṛtyoḥ padaṃ prāpitaḥ |
teṣāṃ brahmabhidāṃ vidhāya vidhivat prāṇāntikaṃ vidyayāprāyaścittam idaṃ mayā punar asau brahmāikatāṃ nīyate ||

div.p: tad bhavatu | prastutavidhānāya śamādīn udyojayāmaḥ |
((niṣkrāntau))
((tataḥ praviśati dambhaḥ |))

dambhaḥ — ādiṣṭo 'smi mahārājamahāmohena yathā — «vatsa dambha pratijñātaṃ sāmātyena vivekena prabodhodayāya, preṣitāś ca teṣu teṣu tīrtheṣu śamadamādayaḥ | sa cāyam asmākam upasthitaḥ kulakṣayo, bhavadbhir avahitaiḥ pratikartavyaḥ | tatra pṛthivyāṃ paramaṃ muktikṣetraṃ vārāṇasī nāma nagarī | tad bhavāṃs tatra gatvā caturṇām apy āśramāṇāṃ niḥśreyasavighnāya prayatatāṃ” iti | tad idānīṃ vaśīkṛtabhūyiṣṭhā mayā vārāṇasī saṃpāditaś ca svāmino yathānirdiṣṭa ādeśaḥ | tathā hi madadhiṣṭhitair idānīm —

lg.l: veśyāveśmasu sīdhugandhilalanāvaktrāsavāmoditairnītvā nirbharamanmathotsavarasair unnidracandrāḥ kṣapāḥ, |
sarvajñā iti dīkṣitā iti cirāt prāptāgnihotrā itibrahmajñā iti tāpasā iti divā dhūrtair jagad vañcyate ||

div.p: ((vilokya)) ko 'py ayaṃ pāntho bhāgīrathīm uttīrya sāṃpratam ita evābhivartate? yathā cāyaṃ —

lg.l: jvalann ivābhimānena, grasann iva jagattrayīm, |
bhartsayann iva vāgjālaiḥ, prajñayopahasann iva ||

div.p: tathā tarkayāmi | nūnam ayaṃ dakṣiṇarāḍhāpradeśād āgataḥ | tad asmād āryasyāhaṃkārasya vṛttāntam avagacchāmi | ((iti parikrāmati |))
((tataḥ praviśaty ahaṅkāro yathānirdiṣṭaḥ |))
ahaṅkāraḥ — aho! mūrkhabahulaṃ jagat! tathā hi —

lg.l: nāivāśrāvi guror mataṃ, na viditaṃ kaumārilaṃ darśanaṃ,tattvajñānam aho na śālikagirāṃ vācaspateḥ kā kathā? |
sūktaṃ nāpi mahōdadher adhigataṃ, māhāvratī nekṣitā,sūkṣmā vastuvicāraṇā, nṛpaśubhiḥ svasthaiḥ kathaṃ sthīyate ||

div.p: ((vilokya)) ete tāvad arthāvadhāraṇavidhurāḥ; svādhyāyādhyayanamātraniratā vedaviplāvakā eva | ((punar anyato gatvā |)) ete ca bhikṣāmātraṃ gṛhītayativratā, muṇḍitamuṇḍāḥ paṇḍitammanyā vedāntaśāstraṃ vyākulayanti | ((vihasya))

lg.l: pratyakṣādipramāsiddhaviruddhārthābhidhāyinaḥ, |
vedāntā yadi śāstrāṇi bauddhaiḥ kim aparādhyate? ||

div.p: tad etad vāṅmātraśravaṇam api gurutaraduritodayāya! ((punar anyato gatvā |)) ete ca śaivapāśupatādayo durabhyastākṣapādamatāḥ paśavaḥ pāṣaṇḍāḥ! amīṣāṃ saṃbhāṣaṇād api narā narakaṃ yānti | tad ete darśanapathād dūrataḥ pariharaṇīyāḥ | ((punar anyato gatvā |)) ete ca —

lg.l: gaṅgātīrataraṅgaśītalaśilāvinyastabhāsvadbṛsīsaṃviṣṭāḥ, kuśamuṣṭimaṇḍitamahādaṇḍāḥ karaṇḍojjvalāḥ, |
paryāyagrathitākṣasūtravalayapratyekabījagrahavyagrāgrāṅgulayo haranti dhanināṃ vittāny, aho dāmbhikāḥ! ||

div.p: ((anyato gatvā vilokya |)) ete tridaṇḍavyapadeśajīvino dvaitādvaitamārgaparibhraṣṭā eva! aye! kasyāitad dvāropāntanikhātātiprāṃśuvaṃśakāṇḍatāṇḍavitadhautasitasūkṣmāmbarasahasram, itas tato vinyastakṛṣṇājinadṛṣadupalasamiccaṣālolūkhalamusalam, anavaratahutājyagandhīdhūmaśyāmalitagaganamaṇḍalam amarasarito nātidūre vibhāty āśramamaṇḍalam? nūnam idaṃ kasyāpi gṛhamedhino gṛhaṃ bhaviṣyati | bhavatu, yuktam asmākam atipavitram etad dvitridivasanivāsasthānam | ((praveśaṃ nāṭayati vilokya ca |)) aye!

lg.l: mṛdbindulāñchitalalāṭabhujodaroraḥkāṇṭh'oṣṭhapṛṣṭhacibukorukapolajānuḥ; |
cūḍāgrakarṇakaṭipāṇivirājamānadarbhāṅkuraḥ — sphurati! mūrta ivāiṣa dambhaḥ ||

div.p: bhavatūpasarpāmy enam | ((upasṛtya |)) kalyāṇam bhavatu, bhavatām!
((dambho huṃkāreṇa nivārayati |)) ((praviśati baṭuḥ |))
baṭuḥ — ((sasaṃbhramam |)) brahman, dūrata eva sthīyatām! yataḥ pādau prakṣālya etad āśramapadaṃ praveṣṭavyam!
ahaṅkāraḥ — ((sakrodham)) āḥ pāpa! turuṣkadeśaṃ prāptāḥ smaḥ, yatra śrotriyān atithīn āsanapādyādibhir api gṛhiṇo nopatiṣṭhanti!
dambhaḥ — ((hastasaṃjñayā samāśvāsayati |))
baṭuḥ — evam ārādhyapādā ājñāpayanti dūradeśād āgatasyāryasya kulaśīlādikaṃ na samyag asmābhir viditam |
ahaṅkāraḥ — āḥ! katham asmākam api kulaśīlādikam idānīṃ parīkṣitavyam? śrūyatām!

lg.l: gauḍaṃ rāṣṭram anuttamaṃ, nirūpamā tatrāpi rāḍhāpurī,bhūriśreṣṭhikanāma dhāma paramaṃ tatrottamo naḥ pitā |
tatputrāś ca mahākulā na viditāḥ kasyātra teṣām api,prajñāśīlavivekadhairyavinayācārair ahaṃ cottamaḥ ||

div.p: ((dambho baṭuṃ paśyati |))
baṭuḥ — ((tāmraghaṭīṃ gṛhītvā |)) brahman! pādaśaucaṃ vidhīyatām!
ahaṅkāraḥ — bhavatu | ko 'tra virodhaḥ? evaṃ kriyate | ((tathā kṛtvopasarpati))
((dambho dantān saṃpīḍya baṭuṃ paśyati))
baṭuḥ — dūre tāvat sthīyatām! vātāhatāḥ prasvedakaṇikāḥ prasaranti!
ahaṅkāraḥ — aho! apūrvaṃ idaṃ brāhmaṇyam!
baṭuḥ — brahman evam etat! tathā hi —

lg.l: aspṛṣṭacaraṇā hy asya cūḍāmaṇimarīcibhiḥ, |
nīrājayanti bhūpālāḥ pādapīṭhāntabhūtalam ||

div.p: ahaṅkāraḥ — ((svagatam |)) aye! dambhagrāhyo 'yaṃ deśaḥ! ((prakāśam)) bhavatu | asminn āsane upaviśāmi! ((tathā kartum icchati |))
baṭuḥ — māivam! nārādhyapādānām anyair āsanam ākramyate!
ahaṅkāraḥ — āḥ pāpa! asmābhir api dakṣiṇarāḍhāpradeśaprasiddhaviśuddhibhir nākramaṇīyam idam āsanam! śṛṇu re mūrkha —

lg.l: nāsmākaṃ jananī tathojjvalakulā, sacchrotriyāṇāṃ punarvyūḍhā kācana kanyakā khalu mayā tenāsmi tātādhikaḥ |
asmatsyālakabhāgineyadayitā mithyābhiśastā, yatastatsaṃparkavaśān mayā svagṛhiṇī preyasy api projjhitā ||

div.p: dambhaḥ — brahman, yady apy evaṃ, tathāpy aviditāsmadvṛttānto bhavān | tathā hi —

lg.l: sadanam upagato 'haṃ pūrvam ambhojayoneḥ,sapadi munibhir uccair āsaneṣūjjhiteṣu, |
saśapatham anunīya brahmaṇā gomayāmbhaḥparimṛjitanijorāv āśu saṃveśito 'smi ||

div.p: ahaṅkāraḥ — ((svagatam)) aho! dāmbhikasya brāḥmaṇasyātyuktiḥ! ((vicintya)) athavā … dambhasyāiva! bhavatv evaṃ tāvat! ((prakāśam)) āḥ, kim evaṃ garvāyase? ((sakrodham))

lg.l: are! ka iva vāsavaḥ? kathaya ko nu padmodbhavo?vada prabhavabhūmayo jagati kā ṛṣīṇām api? |
avehi tapaso balaṃ mama purandarāṇāṃ śataṃśataṃ ca parameṣṭhināṃ patatu vā munīnāṃ śatam ||

div.p: dambhaḥ — ((vilokya sānandam |)) aye! āryaḥ pitāmaho 'asmākam ahaṅkāraḥ! ārya! dambho lobhātmajo 'haṃ bho abhivādaye!
ahaṅkāraḥ — vatsa, āyuṣmān bhava! bālaḥ khalv asi mayā dvāparānte dṛṣṭaḥ! saṃprati cirakālaviprakarṣād vārdhakyagrastatayā ca na samyak pratyabhijānāmi! api tvatkumārasyānṛtasya kuśalam?
dambhaḥ — atha kim? so 'py atrāiva, mahāmohasyājñayā vartate | na hi tena vinā mūhurtam apy ahaṃ prabhavāmi |
ahaṅkāraḥ — atha tava mātāpitarau tṛṣṇālobhāv api kuśalau?
dambhaḥ — tāv api rājño mahāmohasyājñayā 'trāiva vartete | tayor vinā, kṣaṇam api na tiṣṭhāmi | āryamiśraiḥ punaḥ kena prayojanenātra prasādaḥ kṛtaḥ?
ahaṅkāraḥ — vatsa, mayā mahāmohasya vivekasakāśād atyāhitaṃ śrutam | tena tad vṛttāntaṃ pratyetum āgato 'smi |
dambhaḥ — tarhi svāgatam evāryasya | yato mahārājasyāpīndralokād atrāgamanaṃ śrūyate | asti ca kiṃvadantī yad devena vārāṇasī rājadhānī vastuṃ nirūpiteti |
ahaṅkāraḥ — kiṃ punar vārāṇasyāṃ sarvātmanā mohasyāvasthānakāraṇam iti?
dambhaḥ — ārya, nanu vivekoparodha eva | tathā hi —

lg.l: vidyāprabodhodayajanmabhūmir, vārāṇasī brahmapurī duratyayā |
asau kulocchedavidhiṃ cikitsur, nirvastum atrecchati nityam eva ||

div.p: ahaṅkāraḥ — ((sabhayam)) yady evam, aśakyapratīkāra evāyam arthaḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: paramam aviduṣāṃ padaṃ narāṇāṃpuravijayī karuṇāvidheyacetāḥ |
kathayati bhagavān ihāntakāle,bhavabhayakātaratārakaṃ prabodham ||

div.p: dambhaḥ — satyam etat, tathāpi nāitat kāmakrodhābhibhūtānāṃ sambhāvyate! tathā hy udāharanti tairthikāḥ —

lg.l: «yasya hastau ca pādau ca manaś cāiva susaṃyatam, |
vidyā tapaś ca kīrtiś ca sa tīrthaphalam aśnute ||” iti ||

div.p: (nepathye) — bho bhoḥ! paurāḥ! eṣa khalu saṃprāpto devo mahāmohaḥ! tena —

lg.l: niṣyandaiś candanānāṃ sphaṭikamaṇiśilāvedikāḥ saṃskriyantāṃ,mucyantāṃ yantramārgāḥ pracaratu parito vāridhārā gṛheṣu! |
ucchrīyantāṃ samantāt sphuradurumaṇayaḥ śreṇayas toraṇānāṃ,dhūyantāṃ saudhamūrdhasv amarapatidhanurdhāmacitrāḥ patākāḥ ||

div.p: dambhaḥ — ārya! pratyāsanno 'yaṃ mahārājaḥ! tat pratyudgamanena saṃbhāvyatām āryeṇa |
ahaṅkāraḥ — evaṃ bhavatu |
((niṣkrāntau |)) viṣkambhakaḥ |
((tataḥ praviśati mahāmoho vibhavataś ca parivāraḥ |))
mahāmohaḥ — ((vihasya)) aho! niraṅkuśā jaḍadhiyaḥ!

lg.l: “ātmāsti dehād vyatiriktamūrtir bhoktā sa lokāntaritaḥ phalānām.” — |
āśeyam ākāśataroḥ prasūnāt prathīyasaḥ svāduphalaprasūtau ||

div.p: idaṃ ca svakalpanāvinirmitapadārthāvaṣṭambhena jagad eva durvidagdhair vañcyate | tathā hi —

lg.l: “yan nāsty eva tad asti vastv” iti mṛṣā jalpadbhir evāstikairvācālair bahubhis tu satyavacaso nindyāḥ kṛtā nāstikāḥ |
haṃ ho! paśyata! tattvato yadi punaś chinnād ito varṣmaṇodṛṣṭaḥ kiṃ pariṇāmarūṣitaciter jīvaḥ pṛthak kair api? ||

div.p: api ca, na kevalaṃ jagad, ātmāiva tāvad amībhir vañcyate! tathā hi —

lg.l: tulyatve vapuṣāṃ mukhādyavayavair varṇakramaḥ kīdṛśo?yoṣeyaṃ vasu vā parasya tad amuṃ bhedaṃ na vidmo vayam |
hiṃsāyām athavā yatheṣṭagamane, strīṇāṃ parasvagrahe,kāryākāryakathāṃ tathāpi yad amī niṣpauruṣāḥ kurvate ||

div.p: ((vicintya, saślāgham |)) sarvathā lokāyatam eva śāstraṃ yatra pratyakśam eva pramāṇaṃ; pṛthivyaptejovāyavas tattvāni; arthakāmau puruṣārthau; bhūtany eva cetayante | nāsti paralokaḥ, mṛtyur evāpavargaḥ | tad etad asmadabhiprāyānubandhinā vācaspatinā praṇīya cārvākāya samarpitam | tena ca śiṣyopaśiṣyadvāreṇāsmiṃl loke bahulīkṛtaṃ tantram |
((tataḥ praviśati cārvākaḥ śiṣyaś ca))
cārvākaḥ — vatsa, jānāsi daṇḍanītir eva vidyā! atrāiva vārtāntarbhavati | dhūrtapralāpas trayī! svargotpādakatvena viśeṣābhāvāt | paśya —

lg.l: svargaḥ kartṛkriyādravyavināśe yadi yajvanām, |
tato dāvāgnidagdhānāṃ phalaṃ syad bhūri bhūruhām ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: nihatasya paśor yajñe svargaprāptir yadīṣyate, |
svapitā yajamānena tatra kasmān na hanyate? ||

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: mṛtānām api jantūnāṃ śrāddhaṃ cet tṛptikāraṇam, |
nirvāṇasya pradīpasya snehaḥ saṃvardhayec chikhāṃ? ||

div.p: śiṣyaḥ — ˹ācālia, jaī eso evva puluattho jaṃ khajjae pijjaae, tā kitti edehiṃ titthiehiṃ saṃsālasokkhaṃ palihalia appā gholagholehiṃ palāasāṃtavaṇasaṭṭhakālāsaṇappahudihiṃ dukkhehiṃ khavijjadi˼(ācārya, yady eṣa eva puruṣārtho yat khādyate pīyate ca, tat kimity etais tairthikaiḥ saṃsārasaukhyaṃ parihṛtyātmā ghoraghoraiḥ parākasāntapanaṣaṣṭhakālāśanaprabhṛtibhir duḥkhaiḥ kṣapyate |)
cārvākaḥ — dhūrtapraṇītāgamapratāritānām mūrkhāṇām āśāmodakair eveyaṃ tṛptir! paśya paśya —

lg.l: kvāliṅganaṃ bhujanipīḍitabāhumūlabhagnonnatastanamanoharam āyatākṣyāḥ, |
bhikṣopavāsaniyamārkamarīcidāhairdehopaśoṣaṇavidhiḥ kudhiyāṃ kva cāiṣaḥ? ||

div.p: śiṣyaḥ — ˹ācālia, evaṃ khu titthia ālavanti dukkhamissidaṃ saṃsālasokkhaṃ palihalaṇijjaṃ tti |˼(ācārya, evaṃ khalu tairthikā ālapanti duḥkhamiśritaṃ saṃsārasaukhyaṃ pariharaṇīyam iti |)
cārvākaḥ — ((vihasya)) āḥ! durbuddhivilasitam idaṃ narapaśūnām!

lg.l: “tyājyaṃ sukhaṃ viṣayasaṃgamajanma puṃsāṃduḥkhopasṛṣṭam” — iti mūrkhavicāraṇāiṣā |
vrīhīn jihāsati sitottamataṇḍulāḍhyānko nāma bhos tuṣakaṇopahitān hitārthī? ||

div.p: mahāmohaḥ — aye, cireṇa khalu pramāṇavanti vacanāni karṇasukham upajanayanti! ((vilokya sānandam |)) hanta! priyasuhṛn me, cārvākaḥ!
cārvākaḥ — ((vilokya)) eṣa mahārājamahāmohaḥ! upasarpāmi | ((upasṛtya)) jayatu jayatu mahārājaḥ! eṣa cārvākaḥ praṇamati |
mahāmohaḥ — cārvāka, svāgataṃ te! ihopaviśyatām |
cārvākaḥ — ((upaviśya)) deva! kaler asāv aṣṭāṅgapātaḥ praṇāmaḥ |
mahāmohaḥ — atha kaler bhadram avyāhatam |
cārvākaḥ — devaprasādena kaler bhadram! nirvartitakartavyaśeṣaś ca devapādamūlaṃ draṣṭum icchati | yataḥ —

lg.l: ājñām avāpya mahatīṃ dviṣatāṃ nikhātānnirvartya tāṃ sapadi labdhasukhaprasādaḥ |
uccaiḥ pramodam anumoditadarśanaḥ sandhanyo namasyati padāmburuhaṃ prabhūṇām ||

div.p: mahāmohaḥ — atha tatra kiyat saṃpannam?
cārvākaḥ — deva —

lg.l: vyatītavedārthapathaḥ prathīyasīṃ,yatheṣṭhaceṣṭhāṃ gamito mahājanaḥ |
tad atra hetur na kalir na cāpy ahaṃ,prabhuprasādo hi tanoti pauruṣam ||

div.p: tatrottarāḥ pathikāḥ pāścātyāś ca trayīm eva tyājitāḥ | śamadamādīnāṃ kāiva kathā? anyatrāpi prāyaśo jīvikāmātraphalāiva trayī | yathāhācāryaḥ —

lg.l: agnihotraṃ trayo vedās tridaṇḍaṃ bhasmaguṇṭhanam — |
buddhipauruṣahīnānāṃ jīviketi bṛhaspatiḥ ||

div.p: tena kurukṣetrādiṣu tīrtheṣu tāvad devena svapne'pi vidyāprabodhodayo nāśaṅkanīyaḥ |
mahāmohaḥ — sādhu! saṃpāditam! mahat khalu tat tīrthaṃ vyarthīkṛtam |
cārvākaḥ — deva, anyac ca vijñāpyam asti |
mahāmohaḥ — kiṃ tat?
cārvākaḥ — asti viṣṇubhaktir nāma mahāprabhāvā yoginī | sā tu kalinā yady api viralapracārā kṛtā, tathāpi tadanugṛhītān vayam ālokayitum api na prabhavāmaḥ | tad atra devenāvadhātavyam iti |

mahāmohaḥ — ((sabhayam ātmagatam |)) āḥ! prasiddhamahāprabhāvā sā yoginī, svabhāvād vidveṣiṇī cāsmākaṃ | durucchedā sā | ((prakāśam |)) bhadra, alam anayā śaṅkayā | kāmakrodhādiṣu pratipakṣeṣu kutreyam udeṣyati? tathāpi laghīyasy api ripau nānavahitena jigīṣuṇā bhavitavyam | yataḥ —

lg.l: vipākadāruṇo rājñāṃ ripur alpo 'py aruṃtudaḥ, |
udvejayati sūkṣmo 'pi caraṇaṃ kaṇṭakāṅkuraḥ ||

div.p: ((nepathyābhumukham avalokya)) ko 'tra bhoḥ?
((praviśya dauvārikaḥ |))
dauvārikaḥ — jayatu, jayatu! ājñāpayatu devaḥ!
mahāmohaḥ — bho! asatsaṅga! ādiśyatāṃ kāmakrodhalobhamadamātsaryādayo yathā — “yoginī viṣṇubhaktir bhavadbhir evāvahitair vihantavye”ti |
dauvārikaḥ — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ |))
((tataḥ praviśati patrahastaḥ puruṣaḥ))

puruṣaḥ — ˹ahake ukkaladesādo āado mhi | tattha sāalatīlasaṇṇivese pulisottamasaggidaṃ devadāadaṇam | tassiṃ madamāṇehiṃ bhaṭṭakehiṃ mahālāasaāsaṃ pesido mhi | ((vilokya)) esā vālāṇasī | edaṃ lāaulam | jāva ppavisāmi | ((praviśya)) eso bhaṭṭako, cavvākeṇa satthaṃ kiṃvi mantaanto ciṭṭhadi | bhodu uvasappāmi ṇam | ((upsṛtya)) jedu, jedu, bhaṭṭako! edaṃ pattaṃ ṇilūpañjadu bhaṭṭako |˼(aham utkaladeśād āgato 'smi | tatra sāgaratīrasanniveśe puruṣottamaśabditaṃ devatāyatanam | tasmin madamānābhyāṃ bhaṭṭārakābhyāṃ mahārājasakāśaṃ preṣito 'smi | eṣā vārāṇasī | etad rājakulam | yāvat praviśāmi | eṣa bhaṭṭārakaś cārvākeṇa sārdhaṃ kimapi mantrayaṃs tiṣṭhati | bhavatūpasarpāmy enam | jayatu jayatu bhaṭṭāṛakaḥ | idaṃ patraṃ nirūpayata bhaṭṭārakaḥ |) ((iti patram arpayati))
mahāmohaḥ — ((patraṃ gṛhītvā)) kuto bhavān?
puruṣaḥ — ˹bhaṭṭaka! pulisottamādo |˼(bhaṭṭāraka! puruṣottamād |)
mahāmohaḥ — ((svāgatam)) kāryam atyāhitaṃ bhaviṣyati | ((prakāśam)) cārvāka! gaccha! kartavyeṣv avahitena bhavatā bhavitavyam |
cārvākaḥ — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))

mahāmohaḥ — ((patraṃ vācayati)) “svasti! śrīvārāṇasyāṃ mahārājādhirājaparameśvaramahāmohapādān puruṣottamāyatanād madamānau sāṣṭāṅgapātaṃ praṇamya vijñāpayataḥ | yathā bhadram avyāhatam! anyac ca, devī śāntir mātrā śraddhayā saha, vivekasya dautyam āpannā, vivekasaṃgamāya devīm upaniṣadam ahar niśaṃ pratibodhayati | api ca kāmasahacaro 'pi, dharmo vairāgyādibhir upajapta iva lakṣyate | yataḥ, kāmād vibhidya kutaścin nigūḍhaḥ pracarati | tad etaj jñātvā, tatra devaḥ pramāṇam” iti |
mahāmohaḥ — ((sakrodham)) āḥ! kim evam atimugdhau śānter api bibhītaḥ? kāmādiṣu pratipakṣeṣu kuto 'syāḥ saṃbhavaḥ? tathā hi —

lg.l: dhātā viśvavisṛṣṭimātranirato; devo 'pi gaurībhujaśleṣānandavighūrṇamānanayano dakṣādhvaradhvaṃsanaḥ; |
daityāriḥ kamalākapolamakarīlekhāṅkitoraḥsthalaḥśete 'bdhāv | itareṣu janteṣu punaḥ kā nāma śānteḥ kathā? ||

div.p: ((puruṣaṃ prati vadati)) jālma, gaccha! kāmaṃ satvaram upetyādeśam asmākaṃ pratipādaya yathā — “durāśayo dharma ity asmābhir avagatam | tad asmin muhūrtam api na viśvasitavyam | dṛḍhaṃ baddhvā dhārayitavya” iti |
puruṣaḥ — ˹jaṃ devo āṇavedi |˼(yad deva ājñāpayati |) ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))
mahāmohaḥ — ((svagataṃ vicintya)) śānteḥ ko 'bhyupāyaḥ? athavā alam upāyāntareṇa! krodhalobhāv eva tāvad atra paryāptau | ((prakāśam)) kaḥ ko 'tra bhoḥ?
((praviśya dauvārikaḥ))
dauvārikaḥ — ājñāpayatu devaḥ |
mahāmohaḥ — tāvad āhūyatāṃ krodho lobhāś ca |
dauvārikaḥ — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))
((tataḥ praviśati krodho lobhaś ca))
krodhaḥ — śrutaṃ mayā śāntiśraddhāviṣṇubhaktayo mahārājasya pratipakṣam ācarantīti | aho! mayi jīvati katham āsām ātmanirapekṣitaṃ ceṣṭitam? tathā hi —

lg.l: andhīkaromi bhuvanaṃ, badhirīkaromi.dhīraṃ sacetanam, acetanatāṃ nayāmi |
kṛtyaṃ na paśyati, na yena hitaṃ śṛṇoti,dhīmān adhītam api na pratisaṃdadhāti ||

div.p: lobhaḥ — are! madupagṛhītā manorathasaritparamparām api tāvan na tariṣyanti kiṃ punaḥ śāntyādīṃś cintayiṣyanti? paśya —

lg.l: santy ete mama dantino madajalapramlānagaṇḍasthalā.vātavyāyatapātinaś ca turagā — bhūyo 'pi lapsye 'parān! |
etal labdham, idaṃ labhe; punar idaṃ labdhvādhikaṃ dhyāyatāṃcintājarjaracetasāṃ bata nṛṇāṃ, kā nāma śānteḥ kathā? ||

div.p: krodhaḥ — sakhe, viditas tvayā matprabhāvaḥ —

lg.l: tvāṣṭraṃ vṛtram aghātayat surapatiś, candrārdhacūḍo 'cchinad |
devo brahmaśiro, vasiṣṭhatanayān āghātayat kauśikaḥ ||

lg.head: api cāhaṃ —
lg.l: vidyāvanty api, kīrtimanty api, sadācārāvadātāny api,proccaiḥ pauruṣabhūṣaṇāny api, kulāny uddhartum īśaḥ kṣaṇāt ||

div.p: lobhaḥ — tṛṣṇe, itas tāvat!
((praviśya tṛṣṇā |))
tṛṣṇā — ˹kiṃ ajjaütto āṇavedu?˼(āryaputra ājñāpayatu |)

lg.head: lobhaḥ — priye, śrūyatām —
lg.l: kṣetragrāmavanādripattanapuradvīpakṣamāṇḍalapratyāśāyatasūtrabaddhamanasāṃ labdhādhikaṃ dhyāyatāṃ, |
tṛṣṇe devi, yadi prasīdasi, tanoṣy aṅgāni tuṅgāni cet,tad bhoḥ prāṇabhṛtāṃ kutaḥ śamakathā brahmāṇḍalakṣair api? ||

div.p: tṛṣṇā — ˹ajjaütta, saaṃ jevva dāva ahaṃ edassiṃ atthe ṇiccaṃ ahijutta | saṃpadaṃ ajjaüttassa aṇṇāe bahmaṇḍakoḍīhiṃ pi ṇa me udaraṃ pūraïssaṃdi!˼(āryaputra, svayam eva tāvad aham etasminn arthe nityam abhiyuktā | sāṃpratam āryaputrasyājñayā brahmaṇḍakoṭibhir api na me udaraṃ pūrayiṣyate |)
krodhaḥ — hiṃse, itas tāvat!
((praviśya hiṃsā))
hiṃsā — ˹esa mhi! āṇavedu ajjaütto!˼(eṣāsmi! ājñāpayatv āryaputraḥ!)
krodhaḥ — priye, sahadharmacāriṇyā tvayā, mātṛpitṛvadho 'pi mameṣatkara eva! tathā hi —

lg.l: keyaṃ mātā? piśācī! ka iva hi janako? bhrātaraḥ ke 'tra? kīṭā! |
vandhyo 'yaṃ bandhuvargaḥ | kuṭilaviṭasuhṛcceṣṭitā jñātayo 'mī ||

div.p: ((hastau niṣpīḍya))

lg.l: āgarbhaṃ yāvad eṣāṃ kulam idam akhilaṃ nāiva niḥśeṣayāmi |
sphurjantaḥ krodhavahner na dadhati viratiṃ tāvad aṅge sphuliṅgāḥ ||

div.p: ((vilokya)) eṣa svāmī! tad upasarpāmaḥ!
sarve — ((upasṛtya)) jayatu, jayatu, devaḥ!
mahāmohaḥ — śraddhāyās tanayā śāntir asmaddveṣiṇī | sā bhavadbhir avahitair nigrāhyā |
sarve — yad ādiśati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntāḥ))

mahāmohaḥ — “śraddhāyās tanayā” — ity upakṣepeṇopāyāntaram api hṛdayam ārūḍham | tathā hi, śānter mātā śraddhā, sā ca paratantrā | tat kenāpy upāyenopaniṣatsakāśāt tāvac chraddhāpakarṣaṇaṃ kartavyam | tato mātṛviyogaduḥkhād atimṛdulatarā śāntir uparatā bhaviṣyati, avasīdantī vā viraṃsyati | śraddhāṃ cākraṣṭuṃ mithyādṛṣṭir eva vilāsinī pragalbheti tasmin viṣaye sāiva niyojyā | ((pārśvato vilokya |)) vibhramāvati! satvaram āhūyatāṃ mithyādṛṣṭivilāsinī!
vibhramāvatī — ˹jaṃ devo āṇavedi |˼(yad deva ājñāpayati |) ((niṣkramya mithyādṛṣṭyā saha praviśati))
mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹sahi, ciradiṭṭhassa mahārāassa kahaṃ muhaṃ pekkhissaṃ? ṇaṃ mahārāo maṃ uvālambhissadi |˼(sakhi, ciradṛṣṭasya mahārājasya kathaṃ mukhaṃ prekṣiṣye? nanu mahārājo māṃ upālambhiṣyate |)
vibhramāvatī — ˹sahi, tuha daṃsaṇe appāṇaṃ pi mahārāo ṇa cedaïssadi, tado kahaṃ uvālambhissadi?˼(sakhi, tvaddarśane ātmānam api mahārājo na cetayiṣyati, tataḥ kathaṃ upālambhiṣyate?)
mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹kīsa maṃ alīasohaggāṃ saṃbhāvia viḍambesi?˼(kasmān mām alīkasaubhāgyāṃ saṃbhāvya viḍambayasi?)

vibhramāvatī — ˹sahi, saṃpadaṃ jevva pekkhissaṃ aliattaṇaṃ sohaggassa | aṇṇaṃ ca ghuṇṇantaṇiddāulaṃ via ppiasahīe loaṇaṃ pekkhāmi | tā kiṃ khu ppiasahīe viṇiddadāe kālaṇam?˼(sakhi, sāṃpratam eva prekṣiṣye 'līkatvaṃ saubhāgyasya | anyac ca ghūrṇamānanidrākulaṃ iva priyasakhyā locanaṃ prekṣye | tat kiṃ khalu priyasakhyā vinidratāyāḥ kāraṇam?)

mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹ekavallahā vi jā itthiā hoi tāe vi ṇiddā dullahā ṇāma | kiṃ uṇa amhāṇaṃ saalavallahāṇam?˼(sakhi, ekavallabhāpi yā strī bhavati tasyā api nidrā durlabhā nāma | kiṃ punar asmākaṃ sakalavallabhānām?)
vibhramāvatī — ˹ke uṇa piasahīe vallahā?˼(ke punaḥ priyasakhyā vallabhāḥ?)

mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹mahārāo, tado uvari kāmo, koho, loho a | ahava alaṃ viseseṇa! ettha ule jo jādo hiaaṇihidae rattidiahāi ahiramaī mae ṇa viṇābālo ṭhaviro juvāṇo a |˼(mahārājaḥ, tata upari kāmaḥ, krodho, lobhaś ca | athavālaṃ viśeṣeṇa! atra kule yo jāto hṛdayanihitayā rātridivasāy abhiramate mayā na vinā — bālaḥ sthavīro yuvānaś ca |)

vibhramāvatī — ˹ṇaṃ kāmassa raï, kohassa hiṃsā, lohassa tiṇhā paramappia suṇiadi | tāsaṃ kadhaṃ piajaṇaṃ ṇiccaṃ ramaantī issaṃ ṇa jāṇesi?˼(nanu kāmasya ratiḥ, krodhasya hiṃsā, lobhasya tṛṣṇā priyeti śrūyate | tāsāṃ kathaṃ priyajanān nityaṃ ramayantīrṣyāṃ na janayasi?)
mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹issatti kiṃ bhaṇiadi? tāo vi mae viṇā muhuttaṃ vi ṇa tussanti!˼(īrṣyeti kiṃ bhaṇyate? tā api mayā vinā muhūrtam api na tuṣyanti!)

vibhramāvatī — ˹ado jevva bhaṇāmi tuha sarisī suhaā iha puhivīe ṇatthi tti, jāe sohaggaveragg'uijariahiaāo savattīo vi sampasādaṃ paḍicchanti | sahi, aṇṇaṃ vi bhaṇāmi | evaṃ
ṇiddāulahiaā visaṃṭhulakkhalantacalaṇaneurajhaṃkāramuharāe gadīe mahārāaṃ saṃbhāvaaṃtī saṃkidahiaaṃ karissadi piasahitti takkemi |˼(ata eva bhaṇāmi tava sadṛśī subhagā iha pṛthivyāṃ nāstīti, yasyāḥ saubhāgyavairāgyavijvaritahṛdayāḥ sapatnyo 'pi saṃprasādaṃ pratīcchanti | sakhi, anyad api bhaṇāmi | evaṃ nidrākulahṛdayā visaṃsthulaskhalaccaraṇanūpurajhaṅkāramukharayā gatyā mahārājaṃ saṃbhāvayantī śaṅkitahṛdayaṃ kariṣyati priyasakhīti tarkayāmi |)

mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹kiṃ ettha saṃkidavvaṃ? ṇaṃ amhāṇaṃ mahārāaṇiuttāṇaṃ jevva eso aviṇao | avi a, daṃsaṇamattappasādiapurusāṇaṃ juvaīṇaṃ kerisaṃ bhaam?˼(kim atra śaṅkitavyam? na cāsmākaṃ mahārājaniyuktānām evaiṣo 'vinayaḥ | api ca darśanamātraprasāditapuruṣāṇāṃ yuvatīnāṃ kīdṛśaṃ bhayam |)
mahāmohaḥ — ((vilokya |)) aye! saṃprāpteva priyā me mithyādṛṣṭiḥ | yāiṣā —

lg.l: śroṇībhārabharālasā daragalanmālyopavṛtticchalāllīlotkṣiptabhujopadarśitakuconmīlannakhāṅkāvaliḥ; |
nīlendīvaradāmadīrghatarayā dṛṣṭyā dhayantī manodorāndolanalolakaṅkaṇajhaṇatkārottaraṃ sarpati ||

div.p: vibhramāvatī — ˹eso mahārāo | uvasappadu, piasahī |˼(eṣa mahārājaḥ | upasarpatu priyasakhī |)
mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ((upasṛtya)) ˹jaadu, jaadu, mahārāo!˼(jayatu, jayatu, mahārājaḥ!)

lg.head: mahāmohaḥ — priye —
lg.l: dalitakucanakhāṅkam aṅkapālīṃracaya mamāṅkam upetya pīvaroru |
anuhara hariṇākṣi śaṅkarārdhasthitahimaśailasutāvilāsalakṣmīm ||

div.p: ((mithādṛṣṭiḥ sasmitaṃ tathā karoti |))
mahāmohaḥ — ((āliṅganasukham abhinīya)) aho, priyāyāḥ pariṣvāṅgāt parāvṛttaṃ navayauvanam | tathā hi —

lg.l: yaḥ prāg āsīd abhinavavayovibhramāvāptajanmā,cittonmāthī vigataviṣayopaplavānandasāndraḥ, |
vṛttīr antas tirayati tavāśleṣajanmā sa ko 'piprauḍhapremā nava iva punar mānmatho me vikāraḥ ||

div.p: mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹mahārāa, ahaṃ vi saṃpadaṃ ṇavajovvaṇā saṃvuttā | ṇa khu bhāvāṇubandho pammo kāleṇāvi vihaḍaï | āṇavedu, bhaṭṭā, kiṃṇimittaṃ bhaṭṭiṇā sumaridamhi?˼(mahārāja, aham api sāṃprataṃ navayauvanā saṃvṛttā | na khalu bhāvānubandhaḥ premā kālenāpi vighaṭate | ājñāpayatu, bhartā, kin nimittaṃ bhartrā smṛtāsmi?)

lg.head: mahāmohaḥ — priye —
lg.l: smaryate sā hi, vāmoru! cyutā yā hṛdayād bahiḥ; |
maccittabhittau, bhavatī, sālabhañjīva rājate ||

div.p: mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹mahappasādo!˼(mahān prasādaḥ!)
mahāmohaḥ — yathāiva prakāśitair aṅgaiḥ sarvatra vicarasi, tathāiva pravartitavyam | anyac ca — dāsyāḥ putrī śraddhā vivekena sahopaniṣadaṃ saṃyojayituṃ kuṭṭīnībhāvaṃ pratipannā | tataḥ —

lg.l: pratikūlām akulajāṃ pāpāṃ pāpānuvartinīm — |
keśeṣv ākṛṣyatāṃ raṇḍāṃ pāṣaṇḍeṣu niveśaya ||

div.p: mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹eddahamettae visae alaṃ bhaṭṭiṇo ahiṇiveseṇa! vaaṇamatteṇa vva bhaṭṭiṇo dāsa vva savvo aṇṇāṃ karissadi | sā khu mae mitthā dhammo, mitthā mokkho, mitthā veamaggo, mitthā suhavigghaarāiṃ sātthapalavidāiṃ, mitthā saggaphalaṃ ti bhaṇiantī veamaggaṃ jevva parihalissadi, kiṃ uṇa uvaṇisadam | avi a —˼(etāvanmātre viṣaye alaṃ bhartur abhiniveśena! vacanamātreṇaiva bhartur dāsa iva sarva ājñāṃ kariṣyati | sā khalu mayā mithyā dharmo mithyā mokṣō mithyā vedamārgo mithyā sukhavighnakarāṇi mithyā śāstrapralapitāni mithyā svargaphalam iti bhaṇyamāna vedamārgam eva parihariṣyati kiṃ punar upaniṣadam | api ca —)

lg.l: visaāṇandavimukke mokkhe dosāṇa daṃsaantīe , |
uvaṇisaā hi virattā jhatti karijjaï mae saddhā ||
viṣayānandavimukte mokṣe doṣān darśayantyā |
upaniṣadā hi viraktā jhaṭiti krīyate mayā śraddhā ||

div.p: mahārājaḥ — yady evaṃ suṣṭhu priyaṃ me saṃpāditaṃ priyayā | ((punar āliṅgya cumbati |))
mithyādṛṣṭiḥ — ˹hanta! paāse evvaṃ paütteṇa bhattuṇā lajjemi |˼(hanta! prakāśa evaṃ pravṛttena bhartrā lajje |)
mahāmohaḥ — tad bhavatu! svāgāram eva praviśāmaḥ |
((iti niṣkrāntāḥ sarve |))
((tataḥ praviśati śāntiḥ karuṇā ca))
śāntiḥ — ((sāsram)) mātar, mātaḥ! kvāsi? dehi me prativacanam |

lg.l: muktātaṅkakuraṅgakā vanabhuvaḥ, śailāḥ skhaladvārayaḥ,puṇyāny āyatanāni, santatataponiṣṭhāś ca vaikhānasāḥ — |
yasyāḥ prītīr amīṣu, sādya bhavatī caṇḍālaveśmodaraṃnītā gauḥ kapileva jīvati kathaṃ pāṣaṇḍahastaṃ gatā? ||

div.p: athavālaṃ jīvitasaṃbhāvanayā! yataḥ,

lg.l: mām anālokya, na snāti, na bhuṅkte, na pibaty apaḥ |
na mayā rahitā śraddhā muhūrtam api jīvati ||

div.p: tad vinā śraddhayā muhūrtam api śānter jīvitaṃ viḍambanam eva | tat sakhi, karuṇe, madarthaṃ citām āracaya! yāvad aciram eva hutāśanapraveśena tasyāḥ sahacarī bhavāmi |

karuṇā — ((sāsram)) ˹sahi, evvaṃ visamajjolaṇajjālāvalītikkhāiṃ akkharāiṃ jappantī savvahā viluttajīviaṃ maṃ karesi | tā pasīda muhuttaaṃ dhāredu jīviaṃ, piasahī | jāva ido tado puṇṇesu assamesu muṇiaṇasamāülesu bhāīrahītiresu suṇiuṇaṃ ṇirūvamha | sā kadāi vi mahāmohabhīdā kahaṃ vi pacchaṇṇaṃ ṇivasaï |˼(sakhi, evaṃ viṣamajvalanajvālāvalītīkṣṇāny akṣarāṇi jalpantī sarvathā viluptajīvitāṃ māṃ karoṣi | tasmāt prasīda muhūrtaṃ dhārayatu jīvitaṃ, priyasakhī | yāvad itas tataḥ puṇyeṣv āśraṃeṣu munijanasamākuleṣu bhāgīrathītīreṣu sunipuṇaṃ nirūpayāvaḥ | sā kadācid api mahāmohabhītā katham api pracchannā nivasati |)
śāntiḥ — sakhi, kiyad anviṣyate?

lg.l: nīvārāṅkitasaikatāni saritāṃ kūlāni vaikhānasairākrāntāni samiccaṣālacamasavyāptā gṛhā yajvanām — |
pratyekaṃ ca nirūpitāḥ pratipadaṃ catvāra evāśramāḥ,śraddhāyāḥ kvacid apy aho sakhi mayā vārtāpi nākarṇitā ||

div.p: karuṇā — ˹sahi, evvaṃ bhaṇāmi | jaï saccevva saddhā tado ṇa tāe īrisīṃ duggaïṃ saṃbhāvemi | ṇa khu tārisīo puṇṇamaīo tārisaṃ asaṃbhāvaṇijjaṃ vipattiṃ aṇuhondi |˼(sakhi, evaṃ bhaṇāmi | yadi satyeva śraddhā tato na tasyā īdṛśīṃ durgatiṃ saṃbhāvayāmi | na khalu tādṛśyaḥ puṇyamayyaḥ tādṛśīṃ asaṃbhāvanīyāṃ vipattim anubhavanti |)
śāntiḥ — sakhi, kin nu pratikūle vidhātari na saṃbhāvyate? tathā hi —

lg.l: śrīr devī janakātmajā daśamukhasyāsīd gṛhe rakṣasonītā cāiva; rasātalaṃ bhagavatī pūrvaṃ trayī dānavaiḥ; |
gandharvasya madālasāṃ ca tanayāṃ pātālaketuś chalāddaityendro 'pajahāra — hanta! viṣamā vāmā vidher vṛttayaḥ ||

div.p: tad bhavatu! pāṣaṇḍālayeṣv eva tāvad anusarāvaḥ |
karuṇā — ˹sahi, evaṃ hodu |˼(sakhy evaṃ bhavatu |)
((iti parikrāmataḥ |))
karuṇā — ((satrāsam)) ˹sahi, rakkhaso, rakkhaso!˼(sakhi, rākṣaso, rākṣasaḥ!)
śāntiḥ — kvāsau rākṣasaḥ?

karuṇā — ˹pekkha, pekkha! jo eso galantamalapaṅkapicchilabībhacchaduppekkhedahacchaī! ulluṃchiaciurabharo mukkavasaṇavesaduddaṃsaṇo! sihisihaṇḍapiṃcchiāhattho | ido jevva ahivaṭṭadi |˼(paśya, paśya! ya eṣa galanmalapaṅkapicchilabībhatsaduḥprekṣyadehacchavir ulluñchitacikurabharo muktavasanaveṣadurdarśanaḥ śikhiśikhaṇḍapicchikāhasta ita evābhivartate |)
śāntiḥ — sakhi, nāyaṃ rākṣasaḥ | nirvīryaḥ khalv ayam |
karuṇā — ˹tā ko eso bhavissadi?˼(tarhi ka eṣa bhaviṣyati |)
śāntiḥ — sakhi, “piśāca” iti śaṅke?

karuṇā — ˹sahi, evvaṃ papphurantamaūhamālobbhāsiabhuaṇ'antarāe jalantappacaṇḍamaccaṇḍamaṇḍale diahamuhe kahaṃ pisāāṇaṃ avaāso?˼(sakhi, evaṃ prasphuranmayūkhamālodbhāsitabhuvanāntarāle jvalatpracaṇḍamārtāṇḍamaṇḍale divasamukhe kathaṃ piśācānām avakāśaḥ?)

śāntiḥ — tarhi anantaram eva narakavivarād uttīrṇaḥ ko 'pi nārakī bhaviṣyati! ((vilokya vicintya ca)) āḥ, jñātam! mahāmohapravartito 'yaṃ digambarasiddhāntaḥ | tat sarvathā dūre pariharaṇīyam asya darśanam | ((iti parāṅmukhībhavati ))
karuṇā — ˹sahi, muhuttakaṃ ciṭṭha, jāva ido saddhāṃ aṇṇesāmi |˼(sakhi, muhūrtaṃ tiṣṭha | yāvad itaḥ śraddhām anveṣayāmi |) ((ubhe tathā sthite |))
((tataḥ praviśati yathānirdiṣṭo digambarasiddhāntaḥ |))

digambaraḥ — ˹ṇamo aluhantāṇam, aluhantāṇam! ṇavaduvālagharamajjhe appā divavva palittae | ese jiṇavalabhāsido palamattho mokkhasukkado dhammo! ((iti parikrāmati | ākāśe |)) le le sāvaā! suṇāha, suṇāha!˼(namo 'rhadbhyo, 'rhadbhyaḥ! navadvāragṛhamadhye ātmā dīpa iva pradīptaḥ | eṣa jinavarabhāṣitaḥ paramārtho dharmo mokṣasaukhyadaḥ! re re śrāvakāḥ! śṛṇuta, śrṇuta!)

lg.l: malamaapuggalapiṇḍe saalajalehiṃ vi kelisī suddhī? |
appā vimalasahāvo lisipalicalaṇehi jāṇavvo ||
malamayapudgalapiṇḍe sakalajalair api kīdṛśī śuddhiḥ? |
ātmā vimalasvabhāva ṛṣiparicaraṇair jñātavyaḥ ||

div.p: ˹kiṃ bhaṇāha, kelisaṃ lisipalicalaṇaṃ ti? taṃ suṇāha!˼(kiṃ bhaṇatha, kīdṛśam ṛṣiparicaraṇam iti? tac chṛṇuta!)

lg.l: dūle calaṇapaṇāmo, kidasakkālaṃ ca bhoaṇam miṭṭham, |
issāmalaṃ ṇa kajjaṃ, lisiṇaṃ dālaṃ lamantāṇam ||
dūre caraṇapraṇāmaḥ, kṛtasatkāraṃ ca bhojanaṃ mṛṣṭam, |
īrṣyāmalaṃ na kāryam, ṛṣīṇāṃ dārān ramamāṇānām ||

div.p: ((nepathyābhimukham avalokya)) ˹saddhe, ido dāva˼(śraddhe, itas tāvat |)
((ubhe sabhayam ālokayataḥ | tataḥ pravśati tadanurūpaveṣā śraddhā))
śraddhā — ˹kiṃ āṇavei lāaulaṃ?˼(kim ājñāpayati rājakulam?) ((śāntir mūrcchitā patati))
digambarasiddhāntaḥ — ˹sāvaāṇaṃ kuḍumbaṃ muhuttaṃ pi mā paliccaa |˼(śrāvakāṇāṃ kuṭumbaaṃ muhūrtam api mā parityaja |)
śraddhā — ˹jaṃ āṇavei lāaulam˼(yad ājñāpayati rājakulam |) ((iti niṣkrāntā))

karuṇā — ˹samassasaü piasahī | ṇahu ṇāmamatteṇa piasahīe bhedavvaṃ | jado sudaṃ mae ahiṃsāe saāsādo jaṃ atthi pāsaṇḍāṇaṃ vi tamassa sudā “saddhe” ti | teṇa esā tāmasī saddhā bhavissadi |˼(samāśvasitu priyasakhī | na khalu nāmamātreṇa priyasakhyā bhetavyam | yataḥ śrutaṃ mayā ahiṃsāyāḥ sakāśād asti pāṣaṇḍānām api tamasaḥ sutā śraddheti | tenaiṣā tāmasī śraddhā bhaviṣyati |)
śāntiḥ — ((samāśvasya |)) sakhi, evam evāitat | tathā hi,

lg.l: durācārā sadācārāṃ, durdarśā priyadarśanām, |
ambām anusaraty eṣā durāśā na kathaṃ cana ||

div.p: tad bhavatu | tāvat saugatālayeṣv apy asāv anviṣyatām | ((śāntikaruṇe parikrāmataḥ))
((tataḥ praviśati pustakahasto bhikṣurūpo buddhāgamaḥ))
bhikṣuḥ — ((vicintya)) bho bhoḥ! upāsakāḥ!

lg.l: sākṣāt kṣaṇakṣayina eva nirātmakāś ca,yatrārpitā bahir iva pratibhānti bhāvāḥ |
sāivādhunā vigalitākhilavāsanatvād,dhīsantatiḥ sphurati nirviṣayoparāgā ||

div.p: ((parikramya punaḥ saślāgham |)) aho! sādhur ayaṃ saugatadharmo yatra saukhyaṃ mokṣaś ca | tathā hi —

lg.l: āvāso layanaṃ manoharam, abhiprāyānukūlā vaṇiṅnāryo, vāñchitakālam iṣṭam aśanaṃ, śayyā mṛduprastarāḥ |
śraddhāpūrvam upāsikāyuvatibhiḥ kḷptāṅgadānotsavakrīḍānandabharair vrajanti vilasajjyotsnāṅkurā rātrayaḥ ||

div.p: karuṇā — ˹sahi, ko eso? taruṇataratālatalupallavo lambantakasāapisaṅgacīracīvaro sacūḍamuṇḍiamuṇḍaveso ido jevva aḍiacchadi |˼(sakhi, ka eṣa? taruṇataratālatarupallavo lambamānakaṣāyapiśaṅgacīracīvaro sacūḍamuṇḍitamuṇḍaveṣa ita evābhigacchati)
śāntiḥ — sakhi, buddhāgama eṣaḥ |

bhikṣuḥ — ((ākāśe)) bho, bho! upāsakāḥ bhikṣavaś ca! śrūyatāṃ bhagavataḥ sugatasya vākyāmṛtam! ((pustakaṃ vācayati |)) paśyāmy ahaṃ divyena cakṣuṣā lokānāṃ sugatiṃ durgatiṃ ca | kṣaṇikāḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ | nāsty ātmā sthāyī | tasmād bhikṣuṣu dārān ākramatsu nerṣitavyam | cittamalaṃ hi tad yad īrṣyānāma | ((nepathyābhimukham avalokya |)) śraddhe! itas tāvat! ((praviśya śraddhā |))
śraddhā — ˹āṇavedu lāaulam |˼(ājñāpayatu rājakulam |)
bhikṣuḥ — upāsakān bhikṣūṃś ca nirbharam āliṅgya sthīyatām!
śraddhā — ˹jaṃ āṇavedi lāaulam |˼(yad ājñāpayati rājakulam |) ((iti niṣkrāntā |))
śāntiḥ — sakhi, iyam api tāmasī śraddhā |
karuṇā — ˹evvaṃ edaṃ |˼(evaṃ etat |)
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((bhikṣum ālokyoccaiḥ śabdam)) ˹alele! bhikkhua! ido dāva | kiṃ pi pucchissam |˼(arere! bhikṣuka! itas tāvat | kim api pṛcchāmi |)
bhikṣuḥ — ((sakrodham)) āḥ! pāpa piśācākṛte! kim evaṃ pralapasi?
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale, muñca koham | sācchagadaṃ pucchāmi |˼(are, muñca krodham | śāstragataṃ pṛcchāmi |)
bhikṣuḥ — are, kṣapaṇaka, śāstrakathām api vetsi! bhavatu | pratīmas tāvat | ((upasṛtya |)) kiṃ pṛcchasi?
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹bhaṇa, dāva kkhaṇaviṇāsiṇā tue kassa kide vadaṃ dhālīadi?˼(bhaṇa, tāvat kṣaṇavināśinā tvayā kasya kṛte vrataṃ dhāryate?)
bhikṣuḥ — are, śrūyatām! asmatsaṃtatipatitaḥ kaścid, vijñānalakṣaṇaḥ, samucchinnavāsano, mokṣyate |

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale! muccalajja! kassiṃ vi maṇṇantale ko vi mukko bhavissadi? tado de saṃpadaṃ ṇaṭṭhassa kīrisaṃ uvaālaṃ kalissadi? aṇṇaṃ vi pucchāmi — keṇa de īriso dhammo saṃdiṭṭho?˼(are! muktalajja! kasminn api manvantare ko 'pi mukto bhaviṣyati? tatas te sāṃprataṃ naṣṭasya kīdṛśam upakāraṃ kariṣyati? anyad api pṛcchāmi | kena te īdṛśo dharma sandiṣṭaḥ?)
bhikṣuḥ — nūnaṃ, sarvajñena bhagavatā buddhenokto 'yam eva dharmaḥ |
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale! savvaṇṇo buddho tti kadhaṃ tue ṇādam?˼(are! sarvajño buddha iti kathaṃ tvayā jñātam?)
bhikṣuḥ — nanu re, tad āgamair eva prasiddho buddhaḥ sarvajña iti |

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale! ujjiabuddhae! jaï tassa bhāsideṇa savvaṇṇattaṃ paḍivajjesi, tā ahaṃ vi savvaṃ jāṇāmi | tumaṃ pi pidupidāmahehiṃ sattapulisehiṃ me dāso tti!˼(are! ujjhitabuddhika! yadi tasya bhāṣitena sarvajñatvaṃ pratipadyase, tasmād aham api sarvaṃ jānāmi | tvam api pitṛpitāmahaiḥ saptapuruṣair me dāsa iti!)
bhikṣuḥ — ((sakrodham)) āḥ pāpa! piśāca malapaṅkadhara! kiṃ tāvad ahaṃ dāsaḥ?

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale! vihāladāsībhuaṅga! duṭṭhapalivvajia, diṭṭhaṃdo mae daṃsido | tā piaṃ de vissaddhaṃ bhaṇāmi — buddhāṇusāsaṇaṃ palihalia alihantāṇusāsaṇaṃ jevva aṇusalidu bhavam | diambalamadaṃ ācaledu, bhavam!˼(are! vihāradāsībhujaṅga! duṣṭaparivrājaka, dṛṣṭānto mayā darśitaḥ | tasmāt priyaṃ te visrabdhaṃ bhaṇāmi — buddhānuśāsanaṃ parihṛtyārhatānuśāsanam evānusaratu bhavān | digambaramatam eva ācarayatu, bhavān!)
bhikṣuḥ — āḥ pāpa! svayaṃ naṣṭaḥ, parān api nāśayitum icchasi |

lg.l: svārājyaṃ prājyam utsṛjya loke nindyām aninditaḥ, |
abhivāñchati ko nāma bhavān iva piśācatām? ||

div.p: api ca, ārhato api dharmavedanaṃ kaḥ śraddadhāti?

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹gahaṇakkhattacālacandasullopalāadukhkhalapalamalahassāṇaṃ ādesasaṃvādadaṃsaṇeṇa ṇiluvidaṃ savvaṇṇattaṇaṃ bhaavado alihantassa˼(grahanakṣatracāracandrasūryoparāgaduṣkaraparamarahasyānam ādeśasaṃvādadarśanena nirūpitaṃ sarvajñatvaṃ bhagavato 'rhataḥ)
bhikṣuḥ — are! anādipravṛttena jyotiṣātīndriyajñānena pratāritena bhavatedam atikaṣṭaṃ vratam āśritam | tathā hi —

lg.l: jñātuṃ vapuḥparimitaḥ kṣamate trilokīṃjīvaḥ kathaṃ kathaya saṃgatim antareṇa? |
śaknoti kumbhanihitaḥ suśikho 'pi dīpobhāvān prakāśayitum apy udare gṛhasya? ||

div.p: tasmāl lokadvayaviruddhād ārhatamatād varaṃ sugatamatam eva, sākṣāt sukhāvaham atiramaṇīyam paśyāmaḥ |
śāntiḥ — sakhi, anyato gacchāvaḥ |
karuṇā — ˹evaṃ bhodu |˼(evaṃ bhavatu |) ((iti parikrāmataḥ))
śāntiḥ — ((puro vilokya)) eṣa purastāt somasiddhāntaḥ | bhavatu, atrāpi tāvad anusarāvaḥ |
((tataḥ praviśati kāpālikarūpadhārī somasiddhāntaḥ))
somasiddhāntaḥ — ((parikramya |))

lg.l: narāsthimālākṛtacārubhūṣaṇaḥśmaśānavāsī nṛkapālabhojanaḥ, |
paśyāmi yogāñjanaśuddhacakṣuṣājagan mitho bhinnam abhinnam īśvarāt ||

div.p: kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale! ko eso kāvālaṃ vadaṃ dhāledi puliso | tāe ṇaṃ pucchissam | ((upasṛtya |)) alele, kāvālia! ṇalātthimuṇḍadhāi!, kīliso tuha śokkho kīliso tuha mokkho?˼(are! ka eṣa kāpālaṃ vrataṃ dhārayati puruṣaḥ | tad enaṃ pṛcchāmi | are, kāpālika! narāsthimuṇḍadhārin! kīdṛśaṃ tava saukhyaṃ? kīdṛśas tava mokṣaḥ?)
kāpālīkāḥ — are, kṣapaṇaka! dharmaṃ tāvad asmākam avadhāraya!

lg.l: mastiṣkāntravasābhidhāritamahāmāṃsāhutīr juhvatāṃ!vahnau brahmakapālakalpitasurāpānena naḥ pāraṇā |
sadyaḥkṛttakaṭhorakaṇṭhavigalatkīlāladhārojjvalairarcyo naḥ puruṣopahārabalibhir devo mahābhairavaḥ ||

div.p: bhikṣuḥ — ((karṇau pidhāya |)) buddha! buddha! aho dāruṇā dharmacaryā!
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹alihanta! alihanta! aho gholaṃ pāvaṃ! kāvalieṇa keṇa vi vippaladdho eva eso tti takkemi!˼(arhan! arhan! aho ghoraṃ pāpaṃ! kāpālikena kenāpi vipralabdha evaiṣa tarkayāmi!)

kāpālīkāḥ — ((sakrodham)) āḥ pāpa pākhaṇḍāpaśada! muṇḍitamuṇḍa! caṇḍālaveśa! keśaluñcaka! are! vipralambhakaḥ kila caturdaśabhuvanotpattisthitipralayapravartako vedāntasiddhāntaprasiddhavibhavo bhagavān bhavānīpatiḥ? darśayāmas tarhi dharmasyāsya mahimānam?

lg.l: hariharasurajyeṣṭhaśreṣṭhān surān aham āhare |
viyati vahatāṃ nakṣatrāṇāṃ ruṇadhmi gatīr api |
sanaganagarīm ambhaḥpūrṇāṃ vidhāya mahīm imāṃ,kalaya sakalaṃ bhūyas toyaṃ kṣaṇena pibāmi tat ||

div.p: kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale, kāvālia! ṇaṃ ado jevva bhaṇāmi — keṇa vi endajālieṇā māāṃ daṃsia vippaladdho tti!˼(are, kāpālika! nanv ata eva bhaṇāmi — kenāpy aindrajālikena māyāṃ darśayitvā vipralabdha iti!)

kāpālīkāḥ — āḥ pāpa! punar api parameśvaram aindrajālikam ity ākṣipasi? tan na marṣanīyam asya daurātmyam! ((khaḍgam ākṛṣya)) tad aham asya…
vargeṇa bhargagṛhiṇīṃ rudhirair dhinomi ||

lg.l: etatkarālakaravālanikṛttakaṇṭhanāloccaladbahulaphenilabudbudāughaiḥ, |
sārdhaṃ ḍamaḍḍamaruḍāṃkṛtihūtabhūta

div.p: ((iti khaḍgam udyacchati |))
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((sabhayam)) ˹mahābhāa! ahiṃsā palamo dhammo! hiṃsā palamo adhammo!˼(mahābhāga! ahiṃsā paramo dharmo! hiṃsā paramo 'dharmaḥ!) ((iti bhikṣor aṅkaṃ praviśati |))
bhikṣuḥ — ((kāpālikaṃ vārayan)) bho, bho, mahābhāga! kautukaprayuktavākkalahenāyuktam etasmiṃs tapasvini prahartum |
kāpālīkāḥ — ((khaḍgam pratisaṃharati))
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((samāśvasya)) ˹mahābhāo jaï saṃhalidagholalosāveso saṃvutto tado ahaṃ kiṃ vi pucchiduṃ icchemi |˼(mahābhāgo, yadi saṃhṛtaghoraroṣāveśaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ, tato 'haṃ kim api praṣṭum icchāmi |)
kāpālīkāḥ — pṛccha, pṛccha |
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹sudo tumhāṇaṃ palamo dhammo | adha keliso sokkhamokkho tti?˼(śruto yuṣmākaṃ paramo dharmaḥ | attha kīdṛśo mokṣa iti?)
kāpālīkāḥ — śṛṇu!

lg.l: dṛṣṭaṃ kvāpi sukhaṃ vinā na viṣayair | ānandabodhojjhitā
jīvasya sthitir eva muktir upalāvasthā kathaṃ prārthyate? |
pārvatyāḥ pratirūpayā dayitayā sānandam āliṅgitomuktaḥ krīḍati candracūḍavapur | ity ūce mṛḍānīpatiḥ ||

div.p: bhikṣuḥ — mahābhāga, aśraddheyam etad avītarāgasya muktir iti |
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale, kāvālia! jaï ṇa lussasi tado bhaṇāmi | salīlī salāgī mukko a tti viluddham |˼(are, kāpālika! yadi na ruṣyasi tato bhaṇāmi | śarīrī muktaś ceti viruddham |)
kāpālīkāḥ — ((svagatam)) aye! aśraddhākṣiptam anayor antaḥkaraṇam | bhavatv | evaṃ tāvat | ((prakāśam)) śraddhe! itas tāvat!
((tataḥ praviśati kāpālinīrūpadhāriṇī śraddhā))
karuṇā — ˹sahi, pekkha! rajasas sudā saddhā | sā esā —˼(sakhi, paśya! rajasaḥ sutā śraddhā | saiṣā —)

lg.l: viphullaṇīl'uppalalolaloaṇā,ṇar'atthimālākidacālubhūsaṇā, |
ṇiambapīṇatthaṇabhālamanthalā,vihādi puṇṇendumuhī vilāsiṇī ||
viphullanīlotpalalolalocanā,narāsthimālākṛtacārubhūṣaṇā, |
nitambapīnastanabhāramantharā,vibhāti pūrṇendumukhī vilāsinī ||

div.p: śraddhā — ((parikramya |)) ˹esa mhi! āṇavedu sāmī |˼(eṣāsmi! ājñāpayatu svāmī |)
kāpālīkāḥ — priye, enaṃ durabhimāninaṃ bhikṣuṃ tāvad gṛhāṇa! ((śraddhā bhikṣum āliṅgati))
bhikṣuḥ — ((sānandaṃ pariṣvajya, romāñcam abhinīya, janāntikam |)) aho! sukhasparśā kāpālinī | tathā hi —

lg.l: raṇḍāḥ pīnapayodharāḥ kati mayā caṇḍānurāgād bhujadvandvāpīḍitapīvarastanabharaṃ no gāḍham āliṅgitāḥ? |
buddhebhyaḥ śataśaḥ śape mayi punaḥ kutrāpi kāpālinīpīnottuṅgakucāvagūhanabhavaḥ prāptaḥ pramododayaḥ! ||

div.p: aho! puṇyaṃ kāpālikacaritam! aho! ślāghyaḥ somasiddhāntaḥ! āścaryo 'yaṃ dharmaḥ! bho, mahābhāga! sarvathā buddhānuśāsanam asmābhir utsṛṣṭam praviṣṭāḥ smaḥ pārameśvaraṃ siddhāntam! tad ācāryas tvaṃ śiṣyo 'ham | praveśaya māṃ pārameśvarīṃ dīkṣām!
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale, bhikkhua! kāvāliṇīphalasaṇeṇa dūsido tumam | tā dūlaṃ apasala!˼(are, bhikṣo! kāpālinīsparśanena dūṣitas tvam | tasmād dūram apasara!)
bhikṣuḥ — āḥ pāpa! vañcito 'si re kāpālinyāḥ parirambhamahotsavena!
kāpālīkāḥ — priye, kṣapaṇakaṃ gṛhāṇa | ((kāpāliṇī kṣapaṇakam āliṅgati))

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((saromāñcam)) ˹aho arihanta! aho arihanta! kāvālinīe phalasasuhaṃ! aï, sundali! dedu! dedu! dāva puṇo aṅkapāliṃ! ((svagatam)) are, mahanto khu indiaviālo saṃvutto! tā kiṃ ettha juttaṃ? bhodu | picchiāe ḍhakissam |˼(aho arhanta! aho arhanta! kāpālinyāḥ sparśasukham | aye, sundari! dadātu! dadātu! tāvat punar aṅkapālim! are, mahān khalv indriyavikāra saṃvṛtttaḥ! tasmād kim atra yuktam? bhavatu | picchikayā sthagayiṣye |) ((tathā kṛtvā))

lg.l: ayi! pīṇaghaṇatthaṇasohiṇi! palitatthakulaṅgaviloalloaṇe! |
jaï lamasi kāvāliṇi, tā kiṃ kalissadi sāvakī? ||
ayi pīnaghanastanaśobhini! paritrastakuraṅgavilolalocane! |
yadi ramase kāpālini, tat kiṃ kariṣyati śrāvakī? ||

div.p: ˹aho, kāvāliaṃ jevva ekkaṃ daṃsaṇaṃ sokkhamokkhasāhaṇaṃ | bho, ācālia! ahaṃ tuha dāso saṃvutto | maṃ pi mahābhailavāṇusāsaṇe dīkkhedu!˼(aho, kāpālikaṃ darśanam evaikaṃ saukhyamokṣasādhanam | bho, ācārya! ahaṃ tava dāsaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ | mām api mahābhairavānuśāsane dīkṣayata!)
kāpālīkāḥ — upaviśyatām | ((ubhau tathā kurutaḥ |))
kāpālīkāḥ — ((bhājanaṃ samādāya dhyānaṃ nāṭayati))
śraddhā — ˹bhaavaṃ, palipūliaṃ sulāe bhāaṇam |˼(bhagavan, paripūritaṃ surayā bhājanam |)
kāpālīkāḥ — ((pītvā śeṣaṃ bhikṣukṣapaṇakayor arpayati |))

lg.l: idaṃ pavitram amṛtam pīyatāṃ, bhavabheṣajam, |
paśupāśasamucchedakāraṇaṃ, bhairavoditam ||

div.p: ((ubhau vimṛśataḥ |))
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹amhāṇaṃ alihantāṇusāsaṇe sulāpāṇaṃ ṇ'atthi |˼(asmākam ārhatānuśāsane surāpānaṃ nāsti |)
bhikṣuḥ — kathaṃ kāpālikocchiṣṭāṃ surāṃ pāsyāmi?

kāpālīkāḥ — ((kiñcid vimṛṣya |)) kiṃ vimṛśasi, śraddhe? paśutvam anayor nādyāpy apanīyate | tenāsmadvadanasaṃsargaduṣṭāṃ pavitrāṃ surām etau manyete | tad, bhavatī, svavaktrāsavapūtāṃ kṛtvānayor upanayatu | yatas tairthikā api vadanti “strīmukhaṃ tu sadā śuci” iti |
śraddhā — ˹jaṃ bhaavaṃ āṇavedi!˼(yad bhagavān ājñāpayati!) ((iti pānapātraṃ gṛhītvā, pītaśeṣam upanayati |))
bhikṣuḥ — mahān prasādaḥ! ((iti caṣakaṃ gṛhītvā pibati |)) aho! surāyāḥ saundaryam!

lg.l: nipītā veśyābhiḥ saha na kativārān suvadanāmukhocchiṣṭāsmābhiḥ sarasamadirāmodamadhurā? |
kapālinyā vaktrāsavasurabhim etāṃ tu madirāmalabdhvā jānīmaḥ spṛhayati sudhāyai suragaṇaḥ ||

div.p: kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale, bhikkhua! mā savvaṃ piba! kāvāliṇīvaaṇocchiṭṭhaṃ maïlaṃ maha vi dhālaedu!˼(are bhikṣo! mā sarvaṃ piba! kāpālinīvadanocchiṣṭāṃ madirāṃ mamāpi dhārayatu!)
((bhikṣuḥ kṣapaṇakāya caṣakam upanayati |))

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((pītvā |)) ˹aho, sulāe mahulattaṇam! aho, sādo! aho, gandho! aho, sulahittaṇam! cilaṃ khu alihantāṇusāsaṇe piḍido vañcido mhi ediseṇa sulālaseṇa! ale bhikkua, gholanti me aṅgāiṃ | tā uvaviśamha˼(aho, surāyā madhuratvam! aho, svādaḥ! aho, gandhaḥ! aho, surabhitvam! ciraṃ khalv ārhatānuśāsane patito vañcito 'smi īdṛśena surārasena! are bhikṣuka, ghūrṇanti me 'ṅgāni | tasmād upaviśāvaḥ |)
bhikṣuḥ — evaṃ kurvaḥ | ((tathā kurutaḥ |))
kāpālīkāḥ — priye, amūlyakrītaṃ dāsadvayaṃ labdham | tan nṛtyāvas tāvat! ((ubhau nṛtyataḥ |))

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale bhikkua | eso kāvālio — ahavo ācālio — kāvālinīe saddhaṃ sohaṇaṃ ṇaccedi | tā edāe saddhaṃ amhe vi ṇaccāmha!˼(are bhikṣuka | eṣa kāpāliko — 'thavācāryaḥ — kāpālinyā sārdhaṃ śobhanaṃ nṛtyati | tasmād etābhyāṃ sahāvām api nṛtyāvaḥ!) bhikṣuḥ — ācārya, mahāścaryam etad darśanaṃ! yatrākleśam abhimatārthasiddhayaḥ saṃpadyante! ((madaskhalitaṃ nṛtyataḥ |))
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((˹“ayi pīṇaghaṇi…”˼ ity ādi gāyati))
kāpālīkāḥ — kiyad etad āścaryaṃ paśya!

lg.l: yatrānujjhitavāñchitārthaviṣayāsaṅge 'pi sidhyanty amūḥpratyāsannamahodayapraṇayinām aṣṭau mahāsiddhayaḥ, |
vaśyākarṣavimohanapramathanaprakṣobhaṇoccāṭanaprāyaḥ prākṛtasiddhayas tu viduṣāṃ yogāntarāyāḥ param ||

div.p: kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹ale kāpālia, ((vimṛśya)) ahava ācālia, ācālialāa, kulācālia |˼(are kāpālika, athavā ācārya, ācāryarāja, kulācārya |)
bhikṣuḥ — ((vihasya)) ayam anabhyāsātiśayapītayā madirayā dūram unmattīkṛtas tapasvī! tat kriyatām asya madāpanayanam!
kāpālīkāḥ — evaṃ bhavatu | ((iti svamukhocchiṣṭaṃ tāmbūlaṃ kṣapaṇakāya dadāti))

kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((saṃjñāṃ labdhvā kṣaṇaṃ svasthībhūya |)) ˹ācāliaṃ evva edaṃ pucchissam | jādisī tuha sulāe āhalaṇattī kiṃ tādisī itthiāpulisesu vi atthi?˼(ācāryam ev' aitat pṛcchāmi | yādṛśī tava surāyā āharaṇaśaktiḥ kiṃ tādṛśī strīpuruṣeṣv apy asti?)
kāpālīkāḥ — kiṃ viśeṣeṇa pṛcchyate? paśya —

lg.l: vidyādhārīṃ vātha surāṅganāṃ vā,nāgāṅganāṃ vāpy atha yakṣakanyām, |
yad yan mameṣṭaṃ bhuvanatraye 'pividyābalāt tat tad upāharāmi ||

div.p: kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹bho, edaṃ mae gaṇideṇa ṇṇādaṃ — jaṃ savve amhe mahālāamahāmohassa kiṃkale tti |˼(bho, etan mayā gaṇitena jñātam — yat sarve vayaṃ mahārājamahāmohasya kiṃkarā iti |)
ubhau — yathājñātam āyuṣmatā, evam etat |
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹tā lāakajjaṃ mantīyadu |˼(tasmād rājakāryaṃ mantrayatām)
kāpālīkāḥ — kiṃ tat?
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ˹sattassa sudā saddhā mahālāassa aṇṇāe āhalaṇīe tti |˼(sattvasya sutā śraddhā mahārājasyājñayāharaṇiyeti |)
kāpālīkāḥ — kathaya kvāsau dāsyāḥ putrī? eṣa tām aciram eva vidyābalād upāharāmi |
((kṣapaṇakaḥ khaṇḍinīm ādāya gaṇayati))
śāntiḥ — sakhi, ambām uddviśyāiva hatāśānām ālāpaḥ śṛṇomi; tad avadhānena tāvad ākarṇayāvaḥ |
karuṇā — ˹sahi, evvaṃ karemha |˼(sakhi, evaṃ kurvaḥ |) ((ubhe tathā kurutaḥ |))
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((gāthāṃ gaṇayitvā |))

lg.l: ṇatthi jale, ṇatthi vaṇe, ṇatthi gilibilesu, ṇatthi pāāle, |
sā viṇṇubhattisahidā ṇivasadi hiae mahappāṇam ||
nāsti jale, nāsti vane, nāsti giribileṣu, nāsti pātāle, |
sā viṣṇubhaktisahitā nivasati hṛdaye mahātmanām ||

div.p: karuṇā — ((sānandam)) ˹sahi, diṭṭhiā vaḍḍhasi | sudaṃ viṇṇubhattīe devīe pāsavaṭṭiṇī saddhe tti |˼(sakhi, diṣṭyā vardhase | śrutaṃ viṣṇubhaktyā devyāḥ pārśvavartinī śraddheti |)
((śāntiḥ harṣaṃ nāṭayati |))
bhikṣuḥ — atha dharmasya kāmād apakrāntasya kutra pravṛttiḥ?
kṣapaṇakaḥ — ((punar gaṇayitvā))

lg.l: ṇatthi jale, ṇatthi vaṇe, ṇatthi gilibilesu, ṇatthi pāāle, |
sā viṇṇubhattisahido vatta hiae mahappāṇam ||
nāsti jale, nāsti vane, nāsti giribileṣu, nāsti pātāle, |
sa viṣṇubhaktisahito vartate hṛdaye mahātmanām ||

div.p: kāpālīkāḥ — ((saviṣādam)) aho mahat kaṣṭam āpatitaṃ mahārājasya! tathā hi —

lg.l: mūlaṃ devī siddhaye viṣṇubhaktis,tāṃ ca śraddhānuvratā sattvakanyā; |
kāmān muktas tatra dharmo 'py abhūc cet,siddhaṃ manye tad vivekasya sādhyam ||

div.p: tathāpi tāvad asuvyayenāpi svāminaḥ prayojanam anuṣṭheyam | tan mahābhairavīṃ vidyāṃ dharmaśraddhayor āharaṇāya prasthāpayāmaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntāḥ))
śāntiḥ — āvām apy evaṃ hatāśānāṃ vyavasāyaṃ devyai viṣṇubhaktyai nivedayāvaḥ |
((iti niṣkrāntāḥ sarve))
((tataḥ praviśati maitrī |))

maitrī — ˹sudaṃ mae mudiāsaāsādo jaṃ mahābhairavīkahaḍhaṇasambhamādo bhaavadīe viṇṇubhattīe parittādā piasahī saddheti | tā ukkaṇṭhieṇa hiaeṇa piasahīṃ pekkhissam |˼(śrutaṃ mayā muditāsakāśād yan mahābhairavīkarṣaṇasaṃbhramato bhagavatyā viṣṇubhaktyā paritrātā priyasakhī śraddheti | tasmād utkaṇṭhitena hṛdayena priyasakhīṃ prekṣiṣye |) ((parikrāmati))
((tataḥ praviśati śraddhā |))
śraddhā — ((sabhayotkampam))

lg.l: ghorāṃ, nārakapālakuṇḍalavatīṃ, vidyucchaṭā dṛṣṭibhirmuñcantīṃ, vikarālamūrtim analajvālapiśaṅgaiḥ kacaiḥ |
daṃṣṭrācandrakalāṅkurāntaravalajjihvāṃ mahābhairavīṃpaśyantyā iva, me manaḥ kadalikevādyāpy aho vepate ||

div.p: maitrī — ((svagatam)) ˹ae! esā me piasahī bhaasambhāntahiaā, kalidakampataralehiṃ aṅgehiṃ kiṃ vi mantaantī | saṃmuhāadaṃ vi maṃ ṇa lakkhedi! ālavissaṃ dāva | ((prakāśam)) piasahi, saddhe! kisa tumaṃ uttāviahiaā maṃ vi ṇa āloesi?˼(aye! eṣā me priyasakhī bhayasambhrāntahṛdayākalitakampataralair aṅgaiḥ kiṃ api mantrayantī saṃmukhāgatām api māṃ na lakṣayatī! ālapiṣye tāvat | priyasakhi, śraddhe! kasmāt tvam uttāpitahṛdayā mām api nālokayasi?)
śraddhā — ((vilokya socchvāsam)) aye! me priyasakhī maitrī!

lg.l: kālarātrikarālāsyadantāntargatayā mayā, |
dṛṣṭāsi sakhi sāiva tvaṃ punar atrāiva janmani ||

div.p: tad ehi pariṣvajasva mām!

maitrī — ((tathā kṛtvā)) ˹sahi, taha viṇṇubhattiṇibbhatthidappabhāvāe mahābhairavīe kaḍḍhaṇasambhamādo ajja vi vevandi de aṅgāi |˼(sakhi, tathā viṣṇubhaktinirbhartsitaprabhāvayā mahābhairavyāḥ karṣaṇasambhramato 'dyāpi vepante te 'ṅgāni |)
((śraddhā — “ghorām” ityādi paṭhati |))
maitrī — ((satrāsam)) ˹aho! hadāsā gholadaṃsaṇā! adha tāe āadāe kiṃ kidaṃ?˼(aho! hatāśā ghoradarśanā! atha tayāgatayā kiṃ kṛtam?)

lg.head: śraddhā — śṛṇu —
lg.l: śyenāvapātam avapatya padadvaye māmādāya dharmam apareṇa kareṇa ghorā |
vegena sā gaganam utpatitā nakhāgrakoṭisphuratpiśitapiṇḍayugeva gṛdhrī ||

div.p: maitrī — ˹haddhī! haddhī!˼(hā dhik! hā dhik!) ((iti mūrcchati))
śraddhā — sakhi, samāśvasihi, samāśvasihi!
maitrī — ((āśvasya)) ˹tado tado?˼(tatas tataḥ?)
śraddhā — tataḥ param asmadīyārtanādasañjātadayayā devyā viṣṇubhaktyā —

lg.l: bhrūbhaṅgabhīmaparipāṭaladṛṣṭipātam,udgāḍhakopakuṭilaṃ ca tathā vyaloki, |
sā vajrapātahataśailaśileva bhūmau,vyābhugnajarjaratarāsthi yathā papāta ||

div.p: maitrī — ˹diṭṭhiā miī via saddūlamuhādo pabbhaṭṭā saddhā kkhemeṇa saṃjīviā piasahī! tado tado?˼(diṣtyā mṛgīva śārdūlamukhāt prabhraṣṭā śraddhā kṣemeṇa sañjīvitā priyasakhī | tatas tataḥ?)

śraddhā — tato devyā samupajātābhiniveśayā kathitam, “evaṃ asya durātmano mahāmohahatakasya mām avajñāya pravartamānasya samūlam unmūlanaṃ kariṣyamīti”! ādiṣṭā cāhaṃ devyā yathā, “gaccha, śraddhe, brūhi vivekam kāmakrodhādīnāṃ nirjayāyodyogaḥ kriyatām | tato vairāgyaṃ prādurbhaviṣyati | ahaṃ ca yathāsamayaṃ prāṇāyāmādyanuṣṭhānena yuṣmatsainyam anugrahīṣyāmi | ṛtaṃbharādayaś ca devyaḥ śāntyādikauśalenopaniṣaddevyā saṃgatasya bhavataḥ prabodhodayam anuvidhāsyantīti” | tad aham idānīṃ vivekaniketaṃ prati prasthitā | tvaṃ punaḥ kim ācarantī divasān ativāhayasi?

maitrī — ˹amhe vi catasso baïṇīo viṇṇubhattīe āṇāe viveasiddhikālaṇaṃ mahappāṇam hiae vaṭṭamha |˼(vayam api catasro bhaginyo viṣṇubhakter ājñayā vivekasiddhikāraṇaṃ mahātmanāṃ hṛdaye vartāmahe |) ((saṃskṛtam āśritya |)) te hi —
puṇyakriyeṣu muditāṃ, kumatāv upekṣām, |

lg.l: dhyāyanti māṃ sukhini, duḥkhini cānukampāṃ,
evaṃ prasādam upayāti hi rāgalobhadveṣādidoṣakaluṣo 'py ayam antarātmā ||

div.p: evaṃ catasro 'pi bhaginyo vayaṃ tadabhyudayakāraṇenāiva vāsarān nayāmaḥ | kutredānīṃ priyasakhī mahārājam avalokayiṣyati?

śraddhā — devyāivedam uktam — “asti rāḍhābhidhāno janapadaḥ | tatra bhāgīrathīparisarālaṃkārabhūte cakratīrthe, mīmāṃsānugatayā matyā kathañcid dhāryamāṇaprāṇo, vyākulenāntarātmanā, viveka upaniṣaddevyāḥ saṃgamārthaṃ tapasyatīti” |
maitrī — ˹tā gacchaü, piasahī! ahaṃ vi taṇṇioaṃ aṇuciṭṭhāmi |˼(tasmād gacchatu, priyasakhī! aham api tanniyogam anutiṣṭhāmi |)
śraddhā — evaṃ bhavatu |
((iti niṣkrānte |)) viṣkambhakaḥ
((tataḥ praviśati rājā pratīhārī ca |))
rājā — āḥ! pāpa mahāmohahataka! sarvathā hatas tvayāyaṃ mahājanaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: śānte 'nantamahimni nirmalacidānande taraṅgavalīnirmukte 'mṛtasāgarāmbhasi manāṅ magno 'pi nācāmati, |
niḥsāre mṛgatṛṣṇikārṇavajale śrānto 'pi mūḍhaḥ pibaty ācāmaty avagāhate 'bhiramate majjaty athonmajjati ||

div.p: athavā saṃsāracakravāhakasya mahāmohasyābodho mūlam | tasya ca tattvāvabodhād eva nivṛttiḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: amuṣya saṃsārataror abodhamūlasya nonmūlavināśanāya, |
viśveśvarārādhanabījajātāt tattvāvabodhād aparo 'bhyupāyaḥ ||
“prāyaḥ sukṛtinām arthe devā yānti sahāyatām, |
apanthānaṃ tu gacchantaṃ sodaro 'pi vimuñcati ||

div.p:
iti tattvavido vyāharanti | tathā ca devyā viṣṇubhaktyā samādiṣṭam “udyogaḥ kriyatām kāmādivijaye | tad aham api bhavadarthe gṛhītapakṣāiveti” | tatra kāmas tāvat vastuvicāreṇ
āiva jīyate | tad bhavatu | tam eva tāvat tannirvijayāyādiśāmi | vetravati! āhūyatāṃ vastuvicāraḥ!
pratīhārī — ˹jaṃ devo āṇavedi |˼(jaṃ devo āṇavedi |) ((iti niṣkramya vastuvicāreṇa saha praviśati |))
vastuvicāraḥ — aho! nirvicārasaundaryābhimānavardhiṣṇunā kāmahatakena vañcitaṃ jagat | athavā durātmanā mahāmohenāiva! tathā hi —

lg.l: kāntety, utpalalocaneti, vipulaśroṇībharety, unnamatpīnottuṅgapayodhareti, sumukhāmbhojeti, subhrūr iti — |
dṛṣṭvā mādyati modate 'bhiramate prastauti vidvān apipratyakṣāśuciputrikāṃ striyam | aho mohasya duśceṣṭitam! ||

div.p: api ca yathāvastu vicārayatām amandamatīnām api piśitapiṇḍāvanaddhāsthipañjaramayī svabhāvadurgandhabībhatsaveṣā nārīti nāsti vimatiḥ | tatra vispaṣṭa eva tāvad itaraguṇādhyāsaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: muktāhāralatā raṇanmaṇimayā haimās tulākoṭayorāgaḥ kuṅkumasaṃbhavaḥ surabhayaḥ pauṣpā vicitrāḥ srajaḥ, |
vāsaś citradukūlam alpamatibhir nāryām aho kalpitambāhyāntaḥ paripaśyatāṃ tu nirayaṃ nārīti nāmmā kṛtaṃ ||

div.p: ((ākāśe)) āḥ! pāpa kāmacaṇḍāla! kim evam anālambanam evāvirbhavatā bhavatā vyākulīkriyate mahājanaḥ? tathā hy ayam evaṃ manyate —

lg.l: “bālā mām iyam icchatīnduvadanā sānandam udvīkṣate, |
nīlendīvaralocanā mama parīrambhaṃ bhṛśaṃ vāñchati ||

div.p: are mūḍha!

lg.l: kā tvām icchati? kā ca paśyati? paśo! māṃsāsthibhir nirmitā |
nārī veda na kiṃcid atra, sa punaḥ paśyaty amūrtaḥ pumān ||

div.p: pratīhārī — ˹ido ido edu, mahābhāo! ((ity ubhau parikrāmataḥ |)) eso mahārāo ciṭṭhadi | tā uvasappadu bhavam |˼(ita ita etu, mahābhāgaḥ! eṣa mahārājas tiṣṭhati | tad upasarpatu bhavān |)
vastuvicāraḥ — ((upasṛtya)) jayatu, jayatu, devaḥ! eṣa vastuvicāraḥ praṇamati |
rājā — ihopaviśyatām |
vastuvicāraḥ — ((upaviśya)) deva, eṣa te kiṅkaraḥ saṃprāptaḥ | tad ājñayānugṛhyatām!
rājā — mahāmohena sahāsmākaṃ saṃpravṛttaḥ saṅgrāmaḥ | tad atra kāmas tasya prathamo vīraḥ | tasya ca prativīratayāsmābhir bhavān eva nirūpitaḥ |
vastuvicāraḥ — dhanyo 'smi, yena svāmināham evaṃ saṃbhāvitaḥ |
rājā — atha kayā śastravidyayā bhavān kāmaṃ jeṣyati?
vastuvicāraḥ — āḥ! pañcaśaraḥ kusumadhanvā jetavya ity atrāpi śastragrahaṇāpekṣā | paśya —

lg.l: dṛḍhataram apidhāya dvāram ārāt kathañcitsmaraṇaviparivṛttau darśane yoṣitām vā, |
pariṇativirasatvaṃ dehabībhatsatāṃ vāpratipadam anucintyonmūlayiṣyāmi kāmam ||

div.p: rājā — sādhu, sādhu |

lg.head: vastuvicāraḥ — api ca —
lg.l: vipulapulināḥ kallolinyo nirantaranirjharīmasṛṇitaśilāḥ śailāḥ sāndradrumā vanarājayaḥ, |
yadi śamagiro vaiyāsikyo budhaiś ca samāgamaḥ —kva piśitavasāmayyo nāryas? tadā kva ca manmathaḥ? ||

div.p: nārīti nāma prathamam astraṃ kāmasya | tena tasyāṃ jitāyāṃ, tatsahāyāḥ sarva eva viphalārambhā bhaṅgam āsādayiṣyanti | tathā hi —

lg.l: candraś candanam indudhāmadhavalā rātryo dvirephāvalījhaṅkāronmukharā vilāsavipinopāntā vasantodayaḥ, |
mandradhvānaghanodayāś ca divasā mandāḥ kadambānilāḥ —śṛṅgārapramukhāś ca kāmasuhṛdo nāryāṃ jitāyāṃ jitāḥ ||

div.p: tad alam ativilambena | ādiśatu svāmī |

lg.l: so 'haṃ prakīrṇaiḥ parito vicāraiḥśarair ivonmathya balaṃ pareṣām, |
sainyaṃ kurūṇām iva sindhurājaṃgāṇḍīvadhanveva nihanmi kāmam ||

div.p: rājā — tat sajjībhavatu, bhavāñ, śatruvijayāya!
vastuvicāraḥ — yad ādiśati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))
rājā — vetravati! krodhasya vijayāya kṣamāhūyatām!
pratīhārī — ˹jaṃ devo āṇavedi |˼(yad deva ājñāpayati |) ((iti niṣkramya kṣamayā saha praviśati))
kṣamā —

lg.l: krodhāndhakāravikaṭabhrukuṭītaraṅgabhīmasya sāndhyakiraṇāruṇaghoradṛṣṭeḥ, |
niṣkampanirmalagabhīrapayodhidhīrādhīrāḥ parasya parivādagiraḥ kṣamante ||

div.p: ((saślāgham ātmānaṃ nirvarṇya)) aho! aham…

lg.l: klamo na vācāṃ, śiraso na śūlaṃ,na cittatāpo, na tanor vimardaḥ, |
na cāpi hiṃsādir anarthayogaḥ,ślāghyā paraṃ krodhajaye 'ham ekā ||

div.p: ((ity ubhe parikrāmataḥ |))
pratīhārī — ˹eso devo | uvasappatu, piasahī |˼(eṣa devaḥ | upasarpatu priyasakhī |)
kṣamā — ((upasṛtya)) jayatu, jayatu, devaḥ! eṣā devasya dāsī kṣamā sāṣṭāṅgaṃ praṇamati |
rājā — kṣame, atropaviśyatām |
kṣamā — ((upaviśya)) ājñāpayatu devaḥ | kim artham āhūto dāsajanaḥ?
rājā — kṣame, asmin saṅgrāme durātmā krodhas tvayā jetavyaḥ |

kṣamā — devasyānugrahān mahāmoham api jetuṃ paryāptāsmi; kiṃ punaḥ krodhaṃ tanucaramātram? tad aham acirād eva …
svādhyāyadevapitṛyajñatapaḥkriyāṇām, |

lg.l: taṃ pāpakāriṇam akāraṇabādhitāraṃ
krodhaṃ sphuliṅgam iva dṛṣṭibhir udvamantaṃ —kātyāyanīva mahiṣaṃ vinivārya hanmi ||

div.p: rājā — kṣame, śṛṇumas tāvat krodhavijayopāyam |
kṣamā — deva, vijñāpayāmi |

lg.l: “kruddhe — smeramukhāvadhīraṇam, athāviṣṭe — prasādakramo,vyākrośe — kuśaloktir, ātmaduritocchedotsavastāḍane |
dhig! jantor ajitātmano 'sya mahatī daivād upetā vipaddurvāreti” dayārasārdramanasaḥ, krodhasya kutrodayaḥ? ||

div.p: rājā — sādhu, sādhu |
kṣamā — deva, krodhasya vijayād eva tad anuyāyino 'pi hiṃsāpāruṣyamānamātsaryādayo vijitā eva bhaviṣyanti |
rājā — tat pratiṣṭhatāṃ bhavatī vijayāya |
kṣamā — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntā |))
rājā — ((pratīhārīṃ prati)) vetravati! āhūyatāṃ lobhasya jetā saṃtoṣaḥ!
pratīhārī — ˹jaṃ devo āṇavedi |˼(yad deva ājñāpayati |) ((iti niṣkramya santoṣeṇa saha praviśati)) santoṣaḥ ((vicintya sānukrośam))

lg.l: phalaṃ svecchālabhyaṃ prativanam akhedaṃ kṣitiruhāṃ |
payaḥ sthāne sthāne śiśiramadhuraṃ puṇyasaritām |
mṛdusparśā śayyā sulalitalatāpallavamayī |
sahante santāpaṃ tad api dhanināṃ dvāri kṛpaṇāḥ ||

div.p: ((ākāśe)) are mūrkha! durucchedaḥ khalv ayaṃ bhavato vyāmohaḥ | tathā hi —

lg.l: samārambhā bhagnāḥ kati kati na vārāṃs tava paśoḥ,pipāsos tucche 'smin draviṇamṛgatṛṣṇārṇavajale? |
tathāpi pratyāśā viramati na te? nāpi śatadhāvidīrṇaṃ yacceto niyatam aśanigrāvaghaṭitam? ||

div.p:
idaṃ ca te lobhāndhasya ceṣṭitaṃ cetasi camatkāram ātanoti! yataḥ —
sarvagrāsam iyaṃ grasiṣyati, mahālobhāndhakāravṛtam ||

lg.l: “lapsye, labdham idaṃ ca, labhyam adhikaṃ; tanmūlalabhyaṃ tatolabhyaṃ cāparam |” ity anāratam aho labhyaṃ dhanaṃ dhyāyasi, |
nāitad vetsi — punar bhavantam acirād āśāpiśācī balāt

lg.head: api ca —
lg.l: dhanaṃ tāval labdhaṃ katham api tathāpy asya niyato,vyayo vā nāśo vā tava sati viyogo 'sty ubhayathā |
anutpādaḥ śreyān kim u kathaya pathyo 'tha vilayo?vināśo labdhasya vyathayatitarāṃ; na tv anudayaḥ ||

lg.head: kiñca —
lg.l: mṛtyur nṛtyati mūrdhni, śaśvad uragī ghorā jarārūpiṇītvām eṣā grasate, parigrahamayair gṛdhrair jagad grasyate |
dhūtvā bodhajalair abodhabahulaṃ tallobhajanyaṃ rajaḥ,santoṣāmṛtasāgarāmbhasi punar magnaḥ sukhaṃ jīvati ||

div.p: pratīhārī — ˹eso sāmi | tā uvasappatu, mahābhāo!˼(eṣa svāmī | tad upasarpatu, mahābhāgaḥ!)
santoṣaḥ — ((tathā kṛtvā |)) jayatu, jayatu, svāmī! eṣa santoṣaḥ praṇamati!
rājā — ihopaviśyatām | ((iti svasannidhāv upaveśayati |))
santoṣaḥ — ((savinayam upaviśya)) eṣa preṣyajanaḥ | ājñāpyatāṃ devena |
rājā — viditaprabhāvo bhavān, tad alam ativilambena | lobhaṃ jetuṃ vārāṇasīṃ prati pratiṣṭhatām |
santoṣaḥ — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | so 'ham —

lg.l: nānāmukhaṃ vijayinaṃ jagatāṃ trayāṇāṃdevadvijātivadhabandhanalabdhavṛddhim, |
rakṣo'dhinātham iva dāśarathiḥ prasahyanirjitya lobham avaśaṃ tarasā pinaṣmi ||

div.p: ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))
((tataḥ praviśati vinītaveṣaḥ puruṣaḥ))
puruṣaḥ — deva, saṃbhṛtāni vijayaprayāṇamaṅgalāni, pratyāsannaś ca mauhūrtikāveditaḥ prasthānasamayaḥ |
rājā — yady evaṃ, senāprasthāpanāyādiśyantāṃ senāpatayaḥ |
puruṣaḥ — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))
(nepathye) — bho, bhoḥ! sainikāḥ!

lg.l: sajjyantāṃ kumbhabhitticyutamadamadirāmattabhṛṅgāḥ karīndrā!yujyantāṃ syandaneṣu prasabhajitamaruccaṇḍavegās turaṅgāḥ! |
kuntair nīlotpalānāṃ vanam iva kakubhām antarāle sṛjantaḥpādātāḥ saṃcarantu, prasabham asilasatpāṇayo 'py aśvavārāḥ ||

div.p: rājā — bhavatu! kṛtamaṅgalāḥ pratiṣṭhāmahe | ((pāripārśvakaṃ prati)) sārathir ādiśyatāṃ sāṅgrāmikaṃ rathaṃ sajjīkṛtyopanayeti |
pāripārśvakaḥ — yad ājñāpayati devaḥ | ((iti niṣkrāntaḥ))
((tataḥ praviśati yathoktaṃ ratham ādāya sārathiḥ |))
sārathiḥ — deva! sajjīkṛto rathaḥ | tad ārohatv, āyuṣmān | ((rājā kṛtamaṅgalavidhir ārohaṇaṃ nāṭayati |))
sārathiḥ — ((rathavegaṃ nirūpayan)) āyuṣman, paśya, paśya —

lg.l: uddhūtapāṃsupaṭalānumitaprabandhadhāvatkhurāgracayacumbitabhūmibhāgāḥ, |
nirmathyamānajaladhidhvanighoraheṣam,ete rathaṃ gaganasīmni vahanti vāhāḥ ||

div.p:
iyaṃ ca nātidūre darśanapatham avatīrṇā tribhuvanapāvanī vārāṇasī nagarī |
vibhāvyante bhūyaḥ śaśikararucaḥ saudhaśikharāḥ |

lg.l: amī dhārāyantraskhalitajalajhātkāramukharā,
vicitrā yatroccaiḥ śaradamalameghāntavilasattaḍillekhālakṣmīṃ vitarati patākāvalir iyam ||

div.p: etāś ca pratimukulalagnamadhupāvalīraṇitamukharā, jṛmbhārambhavigalanmakarandabindudurdināḥ kusumasurabhayo nātidūre śyāmāyamānaghanacchadacchāyātaravo, nagaraparyantāraṇyabhūmayaḥ | yatrāite maruto 'pi gṛhītapāśupatavratā dhūlim uddhūlayantas tāpasā iva lakṣyante | tathā hi —

lg.l: toyārdrāḥ surasaritaḥ sitāḥ parāgair,arcantaś cyutakusumair ivendumaulim, |
prodgītāṃ madhuparutaiḥ stutiṃ paṭhanto —nṛtyanti pracalalatābhujaiḥ samīrāḥ ||

div.p: rājā — ((sānandam ālokya))

lg.l: eṣāntardadhatī tamovighaṭanād ānandam ātmaprabhaṃ,cetaḥ karṣati candracūḍavasatir vidyeva mukteḥ padam |
bhūmeḥ kaṇṭhavilambinīva kuṭilā muktāvalir jāhnavī,yatrāivaṃ hasatīva phenapaṭalair vakrāṃ kalām aindavīm ||

div.p: sūtaḥ — ((parikramya)) āyuṣman, paśya, paśya! tad idaṃ surasaritparisarālaṃkārabhūtaṃ bhagavataḥ pāvanam anāder ādikeśavasya viṣṇor āyatanam |
rājā — ((saharṣam)) are!

lg.l: eṣa devaḥ purāvidbhiḥ kṣetrasyātmeti gīyate; |
atra dehaṃ samutsṛjya puṇyabhājo viśanti yam ||

div.p: sūtaḥ — āyuṣman, paśya, paśya! ete tāvat kāmakrodhalobhādayo 'smaddarśanamātrād eveto deśād dūram atikrāmanti!

rājā — evam etat! tad bhavatu | svābhīṣṭasiddhaye bhagavantaṃ namasyāmaḥ | ((rathād avatīrya praviśyāvalokya ca |)) jaya, jaya, bhagavan! amaracayacamūcakracūḍamaṇiśreṇinīrājitopāntapādadvayāmbhoja! rājannakhadyotakirmīritasvarṇapīṭha! sphuraddvaitavibhrāntisantānasantāpasantaptavandārusaṃsāranidrāpahārāikadakṣa! kṣamāmaṇḍaloddhārasaṃhārasaṃghaṭṭasaṃghṛṣṭadaṃṣṭrāgrakoṭisphuracchailacakra! kramākrāntalokatraya! prabalabhujabaloddhūtagovardhanacchatranivāritākhaṇḍalodyojitākaṇḍacaṇḍāmbuvāhātivarṣatrasadgokulatrāṇavismāpitāśeṣaviśvaprabho! vibudharipuvadhūvargasīmantasindūrasandhyāmayūkhacchaṭonmārjanoddāmadhāmādhipa! trastadaityendravakṣastaṭīpāṭanākuṇṭhabhāsvannakhaśreṇipāṇidvayasrastavistāriraktārṇavāmagnalokatraya! tribhuvanaripukaiṭabhoddaṇḍakaṇṭhāsthikūṭasphuṭonmārjitodāttacakrasphurajjyotirulkāśatoḍḍāmaroddaṇḍa! khaṇḍenducūḍapriya! prauḍhadordaṇḍavibhrāntamanthācalakṣubdhadugdhāmbudhiprotthitaśrībhujavallarīsaṃśleṣasaṃkrāntapīnastanābhogapatrāvalīlāñchitoraḥsthala! sthūlamuktāphalottārahāraprabhāmaṇḍalasphuratkaṇṭha! vaikuṇṭha! bhaktasya lokasya saṃsāramohacchidaṃ dehi bodhodayaṃ deva! tubhyaṃ namaḥ! ((nirgamanaṃ nāṭayitvā vilokya ca |)) sādhur, ayam evāsmākaṃ nivāsocito deśaḥ | tad atrāiva skandhāvāraṃ niveśayāmaḥ |
((iti niṣkrāntau))
((tataḥ praviśati śraddhā))
śraddhā — ((vicintya)) prasiddhaḥ khalv ayaṃ panthāḥ | yataḥ —

lg.l: nirdahati kulam aśeṣaṃ jñātīnāṃ vairasaṃbhavaḥ krodhaḥ, |
vanam iva ghanapavanāhatataruvarasaṅghaṭṭasaṃbhavo dahanaḥ ||

div.p: ((sāsram)) aho! durvāro dāruṇaḥ sodaravyasanajanmā śokānalaḥ; yo vivekajaladhārāśatair api na mandīkriyate! tathā hi —

lg.l: dhruvaṃ dhvaṃso bhāvī jalanidhimahīśailasaritām;ato mṛtyoḥ śīryattṛṇalaghuṣu kā jantuṣu kathā? |
tathāpy uccair bandhuvyasanajanitaḥ ko 'pi viṣamo,vivekapronmāthī, dahati hṛdayaṃ śokadahanaḥ ||

div.p: yena tathā krūraprakṛtiṣv api bhrātṛṣu kāmakrodhādiṣu kathāśeṣatāṃ gateṣu |

lg.l: nikṛntatīva marmāṇi, dehaṃ śoṣayatīva me, |
dahatīvāntarātmānaṃ krūraḥ śokāgnir ucchikhaḥ ||

div.p: ((vicintya)) ādiṣṭāsmi devyā viṣṇubhaktyā yathā — “vatse, śraddhe! aham atra hiṃsāprāyasamaradarśanaparāṅmukhī | tena vārāṇasīm utsṛjya, sālagrāmābhidhāne bhagavataḥ kṣetre kañcit kālam ativāhayāmi | tvaṃ tu yathāvṛttam samaravṛttāntam āgatya me nivedayiṣyasīti |” tad ahaṃ devyāḥ sakāśaṃ gatvā, sarvam etat samaravṛttāntam āvedayāmi | ((parikramyāvalokya ca |)) etac cakratīrtham, yatrāsau saṃsārasāgarottārataraṇikarṇadhāro bhagavān hariḥ svayaṃ prativasati | ((praṇamya)) iyaṃ ca mahāmunibhir upāsyamānā bhagavatī viṣṇubhaktiḥ, śāntyā saha kim api mantrayate | yāvad upasarpāmi | ((iti parikrāmati |))
((tataḥ praviśati viṣṇubhaktiḥ śāntiś ca))
śāntiḥ — devi! prabalacintākulahṛdayām iva bhavatīm ālokayāmi |
viṣṇubhaktiḥ — vatse, etasmin vīravarakṣaye mahati sāmparāye jāte na jānāmi balavatā mahāmohenābhiyuktasya vatsavivekasya kīdṛśo vṛttānta iti | tena duḥsthitam iva me hṛdayam |
